    if (abBox) {
      if (!wasEmergency && state._abActivePreset) {
        // Reset buttons + reveal from any previous run on this screen.
        document.querySelectorAll('#postAbRatingButtons button').forEach(b => {
          b.disabled = false; b.style.outline = '';
        });
        const reveal = $('postAbReveal');
        if (reveal) reveal.textContent = '';
        abBox.style.display = '';
      } else {
        abBox.style.display = 'none';
      }
    }

    // Show trigger/suggestion reminder if relevant
    const triggerBox = $('postTriggerBox');
    if (state.craftedSuggestion && state.craftedSuggestion.trigger && state.craftedSuggestion.trigger !== 'ongoing state') {
      triggerBox.style.display = '';
      // Pre-load fire count for this trigger so the button reflects history.
      let fireCount = 0;
      try {
        const fires = (await idbGet(TRIGGER_FIRES_KEY)) || {};
        fireCount = (fires[state.craftedSuggestion.trigger]?.firedDates?.length) || 0;
      } catch {}
      // Passive recall probe — if a previous session's trigger was due
      // for a check-in (set by the boot-time scan into state._pendingRecallProbe),
      // fold a quiet line into the trigger card. No popup, no interruption;
      // user reads if they reach the screen.
      const recall = state._pendingRecallProbe;
      const showRecall = recall && recall.trigger === state.craftedSuggestion.trigger;
      const recallHtml = showRecall
        ? `<div style="margin-top:8px;padding-top:8px;border-top:1px solid var(--glass-border);font-size:0.74rem;color:var(--text-dim)"><span style="color:var(--text-faint);font-size:0.62rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em">recall check</span> · From your session ${recall.daysAgo} day${recall.daysAgo === 1 ? '' : 's'} ago — has it fired since then? If yes, tap above.</div>`
        : '';
      if (showRecall) state._pendingRecallProbe = null; // one-shot
      triggerBox.innerHTML = `
        <div class="post-trigger-title">your trigger</div>
        <div class="post-trigger-text">${escapeHtml(state.craftedSuggestion.trigger)}</div>
        <div class="post-trigger-sub">→ ${escapeHtml(state.craftedSuggestion.coreResponse || '')}</div>
        <button class="btn secondary" id="triggerFiredBtn" style="margin-top:8px;font-size:0.74rem;padding:6px 12px" data-trigger="${escapeHtml(state.craftedSuggestion.trigger)}">${fireCount > 0 ? `✓ fired today (${fireCount} total)` : '✓ trigger fired today'}</button>
        <div class="sublabel" style="font-size:0.62rem;margin-top:4px;color:var(--text-faint)">Tap when you notice the trigger working in real life — feedback shapes future sessions.</div>${recallHtml}`;
    } else if (state.craftedSuggestion && state.craftedSuggestion.coreResponse) {
      triggerBox.style.display = '';
      triggerBox.innerHTML = `
        <div class="post-trigger-title">suggestion installed</div>
        <div class="post-trigger-text">${escapeHtml(state.craftedSuggestion.coreResponse)}</div>`;
    } else {
      triggerBox.style.display = 'none';
      triggerBox.innerHTML = '';
    }

    // For demonstration methods, remind user of the test
    if (method.category === 'demonstration' && !wasEmergency) {
      triggerBox.style.display = '';
      triggerBox.innerHTML += `<div style="margin-top:8px; padding-top:8px; border-top:1px solid var(--glass-border)">
        <div class="post-trigger-title" style="color:var(--accent-purple)">test now</div>
        <div class="post-trigger-text" style="font-size:0.82rem">Try the ${escapeHtml(method.name)} effect now.</div>
      </div>`;
    }

    // Intention-aware reflection prompt — short, contextual nudge for what to
    // notice / do after the session. Hidden on emergency end (the user needs
    // grounding, not philosophical reflection).
    const reflectionBox = $('postReflectionBox');
    if (reflectionBox) {
      if (!wasEmergency) {
        const reflection = POST_SESSION_REFLECTIONS[state.intentionType] || POST_SESSION_REFLECTION_FALLBACK;
        reflectionBox.style.display = '';
        reflectionBox.innerHTML = `
          <div class="post-card-title">a moment to notice</div>
          <div class="post-trigger-text" style="font-size:0.86rem;line-height:1.55;color:var(--text-dim)">${escapeHtml(reflection)}</div>`;
      } else {
        reflectionBox.style.display = 'none';
        reflectionBox.innerHTML = '';
      }
    }

    // Program continuation hint — uses _programSnapshot captured BEFORE
    // advanceProgramDay mutated state. On the final day this is the only place
    // we can still surface the completion celebration; advanceProgramDay clears
    // the IDB record on day N=total.
    const programBox = $('postProgramBox');
    if (programBox) {
      if (_programSnapshot) {
        const sn = _programSnapshot;
        const nextDayHint = sn.isFinalDay
          ? `🎉 You completed all ${sn.totalDays} days of <strong>${escapeHtml(sn.name)}</strong>. The structured arc is yours now.`
          : `Day ${sn.dayJustCompleted} of ${sn.totalDays} complete in <strong>${escapeHtml(sn.name)}</strong>. Day ${sn.dayJustCompleted + 1} unlocks tomorrow — return when you're ready.`;
        programBox.style.display = '';
        programBox.innerHTML = `
          <div class="post-card-title">${sn.icon} program progress</div>
          <div class="post-trigger-text" style="font-size:0.86rem;line-height:1.55;color:var(--text-dim)">${nextDayHint}</div>`;
      } else {
        programBox.style.display = 'none';
        programBox.innerHTML = '';
      }
    }

    // Director Brief reasoning — quiet read-only "why this session was
    // shaped this way" card. Only renders for non-emergency completions
    // where Smart Director actually ran and produced a substantive brief
    // (i.e. not cold-start, where the brief just says "follow defaults").
    // Builds trust by showing the user what the Director reasoned over;
    // pairs with the live impact preview on the calibration slider.
    const briefBox = $('postDirectorBriefBox');
    if (briefBox) {
      const brief = state._lastDirectorBrief;
      const showBrief = !wasEmergency
        && brief
        && !brief.coldStart
        && (brief.reasoning?.length > 0 || brief.warnings?.length > 0 || Object.keys(brief.recommendations || {}).length > 0);
      if (showBrief) {
        const recList = Object.entries(brief.recommendations || {})
          .map(([k, v]) => `<li style="margin:2px 0">${escapeHtml(k)}: <strong>${escapeHtml(String(v))}</strong></li>`)
          .join('');
        const reasoningList = (brief.reasoning || [])
          .map(r => `<li style="margin:3px 0">${escapeHtml(r)}</li>`)
          .join('');
        const warnList = (brief.warnings || [])
          .map(w => `<li style="margin:2px 0;color:var(--neon-amber)">${escapeHtml(w)}</li>`)
          .join('');
        const biasNote = (brief.bias != null && brief.bias !== 0)
          ? `<div style="font-size:0.66rem;color:var(--text-faint);margin-top:6px">calibration: bias ${brief.bias > 0 ? '+' : ''}${brief.bias}</div>`
          : '';
        briefBox.style.display = '';
        briefBox.innerHTML = `
          <div class="post-card-title">why this session was shaped this way</div>
          <div style="font-size:0.78rem;line-height:1.5;color:var(--text-dim)">
            ${brief.recoveryMode ? '<div style="margin-bottom:6px;color:var(--neon-amber);font-weight:500">recovery mode</div>' : ''}
            ${warnList ? `<ul style="margin:4px 0 6px 18px;padding:0">${warnList}</ul>` : ''}
            ${reasoningList ? `<ul style="margin:4px 0 6px 18px;padding:0">${reasoningList}</ul>` : ''}
            ${recList ? `<div style="font-size:0.7rem;color:var(--text-faint);margin-top:8px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em">recommendations applied</div><ul style="margin:4px 0 0 18px;padding:0;font-size:0.74rem">${recList}</ul>` : ''}
            ${biasNote}
          </div>`;
      } else {
        briefBox.style.display = 'none';
        briefBox.innerHTML = '';
      }
    }

    // Emergency cooldown — duration from safetyConfig (default 30s, user-tunable)
    const statusIcon = $('postStatusIcon');
    if (wasEmergency) {
      const cooldownSec = getSafetyConfig().emergencyCooldownSec;
      state._cooldownUntil = Date.now() + cooldownSec * 1000;
      if ($('groundingBox')) $('groundingBox').style.display = 'block';
      // Reorientation card — anchors back to consensus reality (clinical
      // post-emergency protocol, Quinn ERP / Brown-Fromm). Time + place +
      // "session has ended" framing.
      const reorientCard = $('reorientCard');
      const reorientWhen = $('reorientWhen');
      if (reorientCard && reorientWhen) {
        const now = new Date();
        const day = now.toLocaleDateString(undefined, { weekday: 'long', month: 'long', day: 'numeric' });
        const time = now.toLocaleTimeString(undefined, { hour: 'numeric', minute: '2-digit' });
        reorientWhen.innerHTML = `It's <strong>${day}</strong> at <strong>${time}</strong>.`;
        reorientCard.style.display = '';
      }
      // Reset the interactive grounding checkboxes so a previous session's
      // state doesn't carry over
      document.querySelectorAll('#groundingBox .grounding-step.interactive').forEach(s => s.classList.remove('done'));
      if (statusIcon) { statusIcon.textContent = '⚠'; statusIcon.style.color = 'var(--neon-amber)'; }
      // Personalized message — use first name if user opted in. Tone is gentle,
      // not chiding (the user already chose to end early; respect that choice).
      const earlyMsg = firstName
        ? `${firstName}, you ended early. That's okay — take a moment to re-orient.`
        : 'You ended early. That\'s okay — take a moment to re-orient.';
      if ($('postMessage')) $('postMessage').textContent = earlyMsg;
    } else {
      if ($('groundingBox')) $('groundingBox').style.display = 'none';
      if ($('reorientCard')) $('reorientCard').style.display = 'none';
      if (statusIcon) { statusIcon.textContent = '✓'; statusIcon.style.color = 'var(--neon-cyan)'; }
      // Welcome-back message — first name if opted in, with light variation by
      // session count so the very first session feels notably different from the
      // 50th. Avoids the same string forever.
      let welcomeMsg;
      if (sessionCount === 1) {
        welcomeMsg = firstName
          ? `Welcome back, ${firstName}. Your first session is recorded.`
          : 'Welcome back. Your first session is recorded.';
      } else if (sessionCount > 0 && sessionCount % 10 === 0) {
        welcomeMsg = firstName
          ? `${firstName}, that's ${sessionCount} sessions — the practice is becoming yours.`
          : `That's ${sessionCount} sessions — the practice is becoming yours.`;
      } else {
        welcomeMsg = firstName
          ? `Welcome back, ${firstName}. Notice how you feel.`
          : 'Take a moment. Notice how you feel.';
      }
      if ($('postMessage')) $('postMessage').textContent = welcomeMsg;
    }

    // Reset post-session state controls
    const moodFeedback = $('moodFeedback');
    if (moodFeedback) moodFeedback.textContent = '';
  }

  // Persona-specific re-alert scripts
  const PERSONA_REALERTS = {
    // Contemplative
    'driver': "Easing off the gas now. \x5BPAUSE 2\x5D The road brightening. \x5BPAUSE 3\x5D Windows coming down. \x5BPAUSE 3\x5D Cool air on your face. \x5BPAUSE 3\x5D Engine off. Eyes opening. Fully here.",
    'old-master': "And now... returning. \x5BPAUSE 2\x5D Like water finding its level. \x5BPAUSE 3\x5D Breath deepening. \x5BPAUSE 3\x5D Body remembering itself. \x5BPAUSE 3\x5D Eyes open. Present. Clear.",
    'therapist': "And gently now, allowing yourself to return to full awareness. \x5BPAUSE 2\x5D Noticing the room around you. \x5BPAUSE 3\x5D Wiggling fingers and toes. \x5BPAUSE 3\x5D Taking a refreshing breath. \x5BPAUSE 3\x5D Eyes opening. Feeling alert and well.",
    'inner-voice': "Coming back now. \x5BPAUSE 2\x5D You already know how. \x5BPAUSE 3\x5D Feel your hands. \x5BPAUSE 3\x5D The weight of your body. \x5BPAUSE 3\x5D Open your eyes. You're here.",
    'scientist': "Initiating the return sequence. \x5BPAUSE 2\x5D Autonomic functions normalizing. \x5BPAUSE 3\x5D Motor cortex re-engaging. \x5BPAUSE 3\x5D Deep breath — diaphragm expanding. \x5BPAUSE 3\x5D Eyes open. Full alertness restored.",
    'mystic': "Ascending now from the deep place. \x5BPAUSE 2\x5D Rising through the still waters. \x5BPAUSE 3\x5D Breath carrying you upward. \x5BPAUSE 3\x5D The light of day returning. \x5BPAUSE 3\x5D Eyes opening. Returned.",
    'librarian': "And the book closes softly. \x5BPAUSE 2\x5D The lamplight brightens. \x5BPAUSE 3\x5D The chair beneath you, solid. \x5BPAUSE 3\x5D Open your eyes. The library is still here. So are you.",
    'astronomer': "The telescope pivoting earthward now. \x5BPAUSE 2\x5D The mountain under your feet. \x5BPAUSE 3\x5D Gravity reminding you. \x5BPAUSE 3\x5D Dawn approaching. \x5BPAUSE 3\x5D Eyes open. Welcome back to this small, warm world.",
    // Showman
    'showman': "And THREE — energy returning! \x5BPAUSE 2\x5D TWO — eyes fluttering! \x5BPAUSE 2\x5D ONE — wide awake! \x5BPAUSE 2\x5D There you are, fully alert, feeling fantastic. Welcome back, my friend.",
    'mentalist': "And I can sense you're already returning. \x5BPAUSE 2\x5D Yes... there it is. \x5BPAUSE 3\x5D Awareness flooding back. \x5BPAUSE 3\x5D Eyes opening. \x5BPAUSE 2\x5D Fully present. Interesting, isn't it?",
    'bartender': "Alright friend, last call. \x5BPAUSE 2\x5D Time to come back now. \x5BPAUSE 3\x5D Stretch those fingers out. \x5BPAUSE 3\x5D Take a good deep breath. \x5BPAUSE 3\x5D Eyes open. Welcome back, pal.",
    'carnival-barker': "And we're bringing you back, ladies and gentlemen! \x5BPAUSE 2\x5D Three — feeling the energy! \x5BPAUSE 2\x5D Two — almost there! \x5BPAUSE 2\x5D One — eyes WIDE open! Fully alert! Give yourself a round of applause!",
    'magician': "And like every great trick... \x5BPAUSE 2\x5D the reveal. \x5BPAUSE 3\x5D Eyes opening. \x5BPAUSE 2\x5D Everything exactly where you left it. \x5BPAUSE 3\x5D Except you. You're different now. Welcome back.",
    'radio-host': "And we're fading back in now... \x5BPAUSE 2\x5D the signal getting stronger... \x5BPAUSE 3\x5D you're tuning back to this frequency... \x5BPAUSE 3\x5D eyes opening... and you're live. Welcome back, night owl.",
    // Somatic
    'bodyworker': "Bringing awareness back to the whole body now. \x5BPAUSE 2\x5D Feeling the surface beneath you. \x5BPAUSE 3\x5D Fingers and toes waking up. \x5BPAUSE 3\x5D A deep, full breath. \x5BPAUSE 3\x5D Eyes opening when the body is ready.",
    'yoga-teacher': "Deepening the breath now. \x5BPAUSE 2\x5D Gentle movements returning to the fingers, the toes. \x5BPAUSE 3\x5D Rolling to one side if that feels right. \x5BPAUSE 3\x5D Pressing up slowly. \x5BPAUSE 3\x5D Eyes opening. Namaste.",
    'dancer': "Weight returning to the body. \x5BPAUSE 2\x5D Feel the floor. \x5BPAUSE 3\x5D Let the spine stack itself back up. \x5BPAUSE 3\x5D Breath. \x5BPAUSE 2\x5D Movement. \x5BPAUSE 2\x5D Eyes open.",
    'martial-artist': "Returning to center. \x5BPAUSE 2\x5D Root. \x5BPAUSE 3\x5D Breath. \x5BPAUSE 3\x5D Iron posture. \x5BPAUSE 3\x5D Eyes open. Clear. Ready.",
    'midwife': "That's it. Coming through now. \x5BPAUSE 2\x5D Almost there. \x5BPAUSE 3\x5D Big breath. \x5BPAUSE 3\x5D Eyes opening. You did beautifully. You're here.",
    // Authoritarian
    'commander': "Attention. \x5BPAUSE 2\x5D Re-engage. \x5BPAUSE 3\x5D Breathe. \x5BPAUSE 2\x5D Eyes open. NOW. \x5BPAUSE 3\x5D Welcome back. Status: fully alert.",
    'headmistress': "And that concludes today's session. \x5BPAUSE 2\x5D Sit up properly now. \x5BPAUSE 3\x5D Take a breath. \x5BPAUSE 3\x5D Eyes open. \x5BPAUSE 2\x5D Well done. You may go.",
    'interrogator': "And now you're coming back. \x5BPAUSE 2\x5D You already knew you would. \x5BPAUSE 3\x5D Eyes opening. \x5BPAUSE 2\x5D Everything you experienced is still with you. \x5BPAUSE 3\x5D Fully alert. Yes. There it is.",
    'drill-instructor': "Three! Breathe IN! \x5BPAUSE 1\x5D Two! Eyes opening! \x5BPAUSE 1\x5D ONE! You're BACK! \x5BPAUSE 2\x5D Fully alert. On your feet. Outstanding.",
    'dominatrix': "I'm bringing you back now. \x5BPAUSE 2\x5D Because I choose to. \x5BPAUSE 3\x5D Eyes opening on three. \x5BPAUSE 2\x5D One. Two. Three. \x5BPAUSE 3\x5D Good. Welcome back.",
    'surgeon': "Procedure complete. \x5BPAUSE 2\x5D Vital signs nominal. \x5BPAUSE 3\x5D Deep breath on my count. \x5BPAUSE 2\x5D One. Two. Three. \x5BPAUSE 3\x5D Eyes open. Recovery is already underway.",
  };

  // ── Inactive-time accumulator (union of pause + hide windows) ──
  //
  // Pause and hide can overlap (typical case: user pauses, screen locks ⇒
  // tab goes hidden), and we want elapsed-time math to subtract that
  // window once, not twice. _markInactiveStart is called when entering
  // either sub-state; _markInactiveEnd is called when leaving either —
  // it only flushes when BOTH sub-states are inactive (state.paused is
  // false AND state._hiddenStartedAt is null), so the union window stays
  // open across the hand-off when sub-states overlap.
  function _markInactiveStart(now) {
    if (!state._sessionStartTime) return;
    if (!state._inactiveStartedAt) state._inactiveStartedAt = now;
  }
  function _markInactiveEnd(now) {
    if (state.paused) return;
    if (state._hiddenStartedAt) return;
    if (state._inactiveStartedAt) {
      state._inactiveTotalMs = (state._inactiveTotalMs || 0) + (now - state._inactiveStartedAt);
      state._inactiveStartedAt = null;
    }
  }

  function emergencyEnd() {
    if (state._finishing) return;
    state._finishing = true;
    state.abortFlag = true;
    // If currently paused, resume speech engine + drone + unpause state
    // so the rescue sequence can actually play
    if (state.paused) {
      state.paused = false;
      const _now = Date.now();
      if (state._pauseStartedAt) {
        state._pausedTotalMs = (state._pausedTotalMs || 0) + (_now - state._pauseStartedAt);
        state._pauseStartedAt = null;
      }
      _markInactiveEnd(_now);
      try { speechSynthesis.resume(); } catch {}
      if (state.useLocalTTS && _localTTS.ready) { try { _localTTS.resume(); } catch {} }
      if (drone.ctx && drone.running) { try { drone.ctx.resume(); } catch {} }
      // Resume the recorder too — without this the rescue script plays
      // while the recorder is still paused, so the archived .webm cuts off
      // at the pause point and never captures the wake-up sequence.
      if (_recorder && _recorder.state === 'paused') { try { _recorder.resume(); } catch {} }
      $('pauseBtn').textContent = 'pause';
    }
    speechSynthesis.cancel();
    if (state.useLocalTTS && _localTTS.ready) _localTTS.cancel();
    // DEBUG: skip rescue sequence if debug mode is on (consolidated debugMode toggle).
    // This setting intentionally defaults OFF and is NOT saved with settings.
    if (state._debug?.skipRescue) {
      sdLog('rescue skipped — debug mode on');
      finishSession(true);
      return;
    }
    const persona = getPersona();
    const reAlert = PERSONA_REALERTS[persona.id] ||
      "And now... \x5BPAUSE 2\x5D bringing your awareness back. \x5BPAUSE 3\x5D Wiggling fingers and toes. \x5BPAUSE 3\x5D Taking a deeper breath. \x5BPAUSE 3\x5D Opening your eyes. Fully alert.";
    speakScript(reAlert, /* bypassAbort */ true).then(() => finishSession(true));
  }
  function togglePause() {
    state.paused = !state.paused;
    $('pauseBtn').textContent = state.paused ? 'resume' : 'pause';
    // Mirror to MediaSession so the lock-screen play/pause icon stays in
    // sync with in-app state. Without this the OS surface keeps showing
    // 'playing' while the session is actually paused (or vice versa).
    if ('mediaSession' in navigator) {
      try { navigator.mediaSession.playbackState = state.paused ? 'paused' : 'playing'; } catch {}
    }
    if (state.paused) {
      const _now = Date.now();
      state._pauseStartedAt = _now;
      _markInactiveStart(_now);
      speechSynthesis.pause();
      if (state.useLocalTTS && _localTTS.ready) _localTTS.pause();
      if (drone.ctx && drone.running) drone.ctx.suspend();
      // Pause the ambience recording too — without this, a 2-minute pause
      // becomes 2 minutes of silence in the captured .webm. MediaRecorder's
      // pause()/resume() preserve the timeline cleanly when supported.
      if (_recorder && _recorder.state === 'recording') {
        try { _recorder.pause(); } catch {}
      }
      document.body.classList.remove('controls-hidden'); // always show controls when paused
      clearTimeout(_controlsTimer);
    } else {
      const _now = Date.now();
      if (state._pauseStartedAt) {
        state._pausedTotalMs = (state._pausedTotalMs || 0) + (_now - state._pauseStartedAt);
        state._pauseStartedAt = null;
      }
      _markInactiveEnd(_now);
      speechSynthesis.resume();
      if (state.useLocalTTS && _localTTS.ready) _localTTS.resume();
      if (drone.ctx && drone.running) drone.ctx.resume();
      if (_recorder && _recorder.state === 'paused') {
        try { _recorder.resume(); } catch {}
      }
      // Chrome stuck-state recovery. After a quick pause/resume flip the
      // engine sometimes lands in `paused: true, speaking: false` and
      // refuses to drive the current utterance. The original workaround
      // jumped straight to cancel() at 300ms, which silently dropped the
      // sentence the user resumed on. Two-stage approach: at 300ms, if
      // still stuck, try resume() again — the engine usually recovers.
      // Only at 600ms do we cancel as a last resort, with a console
      // warning so we can see in dev tools when the workaround fires.
      setTimeout(() => {
        if (state.paused) return;
        if (!speechSynthesis.paused) return; // not stuck, nothing to do
        try { speechSynthesis.resume(); } catch {}
      }, 300);
      setTimeout(() => {
        if (state.paused) return;
        if (!speechSynthesis.speaking && speechSynthesis.paused) {
          console.warn('[togglePause] engine still stuck after second resume — cancelling current utterance');
          speechSynthesis.cancel();
        }
      }, 600);
      showSessionControls(); // restart auto-hide timer
    }
  }

  // ====================================================================
  // HANDLERS + INIT
  // ====================================================================
  // Stepper clicks (only backward)
  $('stepper')?.addEventListener('click', e => {
    const item = e.target.closest('.step-item');
    if (!item || !item.classList.contains('clickable')) return;
    goToStep(parseInt(item.dataset.step));
  });
  $('btnNext')?.addEventListener('click', () => goToStep(state.currentStep + 1));
  $('btnBack')?.addEventListener('click', () => goToStep(state.currentStep - 1));
$('jumpGuideBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => goToStep(1));
  $('jumpMethodBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => goToStep(2));
  $('jumpIntentionBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => goToStep(3));
  $('jumpAffirmationsBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => goToStep(4));
  $('jumpConfigBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => goToStep(5)); // Step 5 is Configure; step 4 is Affirmations
  $('btnSkipToScript').addEventListener('click', () => {
    state._skippedToScript = true;
    markFeatureUsed(FEAT.SKIP_SCRIPT);
    state.currentStep = 6;
    state.stepsCompleted = { 1: false, 2: false, 3: false, 4: false, 5: false, 6: false };
    // Show the script editor area with empty textarea for pasting
    $('scriptText').value = '';
    $('scriptStats').innerHTML = 'Paste or type your script here. Use <code>===SETTLING===</code>, <code>===INDUCTION===</code>, etc. markers to define phases, or just paste plain text.';
    $('scriptPreview').classList.add('visible');
    // Hide generate button and summary since we skipped config
    showEl('generateScriptBtn', false);
    showEl('genProgress', false);
    updateStepUI();
    notify.info('Paste your script into the editor below, then press Begin Session. You can still jump back with the back button if you want the guided builder again.');
    // Focus the textarea
    setTimeout(() => $('scriptText')?.focus(), 300);
  });

  // scriptText input handler — updates state when user edits/pastes
  $('scriptText').addEventListener('input', () => {
    const text = $('scriptText').value.trim();
    // Debounced undo checkpoint — coalesces rapid typing into one snapshot.
    // Snapshot captures the PRE-input state (this handler fires BEFORE the
    // state.fullScript assignment below, so the current state still reflects
    // what was there before this keystroke).
    history.pushDebounced(500);
    if (text.length > 20) {
      if (state.fullScript && text !== state.fullScript.trim()) {
        _scriptEditedSinceGen = true;
      }
      state.fullScript = text;
      state.parsedScript = parseScript(text);
      state.generatedPhaseOrder = state.parsedScript.ordered || [];
      const spokenOnly = text.replace(/===\s*[A-Z0-9-]+\s*===/gi, ' ').replace(/\x5BPAUSE\s+\d+\]/gi, ' ');
      const words = spokenOnly.split(/\s+/).filter(w => w.length > 0).length;
      const pauses = (text.match(/\x5BPAUSE\s+\d+\]/gi) || []).length;
      const pauseSecs = (text.match(/\x5BPAUSE\s+(\d+)\]/gi) || []).reduce((sum, m) => sum + parseInt(m.match(/\d+/)[0], 10), 0);
      const phaseCount = (state.parsedScript.ordered || []).length;
      $('scriptStats').innerHTML = `<strong>${words}</strong> words · <strong>${pauses}</strong> pauses (${pauseSecs}s) · <strong>${phaseCount}</strong> phases · estimated: <strong>${Math.round(words / 50 + pauseSecs / 60)} min</strong><br>Edit below before starting.`;
      renderPhaseEditor();
    } else {
      state.fullScript = null;
      state.parsedScript = null;
      state.generatedPhaseOrder = [];
      renderPhaseEditor();
    }
    updateStepUI();
  });

  // Fix Timings button
  $('autoTempoBtn').addEventListener('click', () => {
    markFeatureUsed(FEAT.TIMING_FIX);
    const text = $('scriptText').value.trim();
    if (!text) { notify.warn('Generate or paste a script first.'); return; }
    const fixed = fixScriptTimings(text);
    $('scriptText').value = fixed;
    state.fullScript = fixed;
    state.parsedScript = parseScript(fixed);
    _scriptEditedSinceGen = false;
    showScript();
    const stripCount = (state.autoTempoOptions?.stripChars || '').length;
    const stripNote = stripCount ? ` (${stripCount} character${stripCount === 1 ? '' : 's'} stripped per options)` : '';
    notify.success(`Pause timings recalculated based on content${stripNote}.`);
  });

  // ── Auto-tempo cleanup options modal ──────────────────────────────────────
  // Two character groups: SAFE (formatting/decorative — won't break sentence
  // structure) and CAUTION (used by the sentence splitter — strip only if
  // your scripts have unusual punctuation).
  const _AUTO_TEMPO_CHARS_SAFE    = ['*', '_', '#', '~', '`', '|', '\\', '/', '<', '>', '=', '+', '^', '&', '%', '$', '@'];
  const _AUTO_TEMPO_CHARS_CAUTION = ['(', ')', '{', '}', '[', ']', '-', '!', '?', '.', ',', ';', ':', "'", '"'];

  function _renderAutoTempoCharGrid(targetId, charList) {
    const container = $(targetId);
    if (!container) return;
    const active = new Set(state.autoTempoOptions?.stripChars || '');
    container.innerHTML = '';
    charList.forEach(ch => {
      const btn = document.createElement('button');
      btn.type = 'button';
      btn.className = 'auto-tempo-char-btn' + (active.has(ch) ? ' active' : '');
      btn.textContent = ch;
      btn.title = active.has(ch) ? `Click to KEEP "${ch}"` : `Click to STRIP "${ch}"`;
      btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
        if (!state.autoTempoOptions) state.autoTempoOptions = { stripChars: '', stripOrphanPunctuation: true };
        const cur = new Set(state.autoTempoOptions.stripChars || '');
        if (cur.has(ch)) cur.delete(ch); else cur.add(ch);
        state.autoTempoOptions.stripChars = Array.from(cur).join('');
        _renderAutoTempoOptsModal(); // re-render both grids + preview
        saveUserSettings();
      });
      container.appendChild(btn);
    });
  }

  function _renderAutoTempoOptsModal() {
    const opts = state.autoTempoOptions || { stripChars: '', stripOrphanPunctuation: true };
    const cb = $('autoTempoStripOrphan'); if (cb) cb.checked = opts.stripOrphanPunctuation !== false;
    _renderAutoTempoCharGrid('autoTempoCharGridSafe',    _AUTO_TEMPO_CHARS_SAFE);
    _renderAutoTempoCharGrid('autoTempoCharGridCaution', _AUTO_TEMPO_CHARS_CAUTION);
    const preview = $('autoTempoStripPreview');
    if (preview) {
      const chars = opts.stripChars || '';
      preview.textContent = chars
        ? `Will strip these characters: ${chars.split('').map(c => `"${c}"`).join(' ')}`
        : 'No characters will be stripped (default behavior).';
    }
  }

  $('autoTempoOptsBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
    _renderAutoTempoOptsModal();
    $('autoTempoOptsModal')?.classList.add('visible');
  });
  $('autoTempoOptsCloseBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
    $('autoTempoOptsModal')?.classList.remove('visible');
  });
  $('autoTempoOptsResetBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
    state.autoTempoOptions = { stripChars: '', stripOrphanPunctuation: true };
    _renderAutoTempoOptsModal();
    saveUserSettings();
    notify.info('Auto-tempo options reset to defaults.');
  });
  $('autoTempoStripOrphan')?.addEventListener('change', e => {
    if (!state.autoTempoOptions) state.autoTempoOptions = { stripChars: '', stripOrphanPunctuation: true };
    state.autoTempoOptions.stripOrphanPunctuation = !!e.target.checked;
    saveUserSettings();
  });
  // Click-outside-to-close (consistent with other modals using this pattern)
  $('autoTempoOptsModal')?.addEventListener('click', e => {
    if (e.target.id === 'autoTempoOptsModal') $('autoTempoOptsModal').classList.remove('visible');
  });

  // Filter tabs
  $('personaFilterTabs').addEventListener('click', e => {
    if (!e.target.dataset.filter) return;
    state.personaFilter = e.target.dataset.filter;
    document.querySelectorAll('#personaFilterTabs .filter-tab').forEach(t => t.classList.toggle('active', t.dataset.filter === state.personaFilter));
    renderPersonaGrid();
  });

  // Quick-Start Presets / Structured Programs — restore collapse state
  // from localStorage on init. New users start collapsed (no key set);
  // returning users get whichever state they last left it in.
  function _wirePresetCollapse(detailsId, storageKey) {
    const el = $(detailsId);
    if (!el) return;
    try {
      if (localStorage.getItem(storageKey) === '1') el.open = true;
    } catch {}
    el.addEventListener('toggle', () => {
      try { localStorage.setItem(storageKey, el.open ? '1' : '0'); } catch {}
    });
  }
  _wirePresetCollapse('quickStartPresetsDetails', 'stillness_presets_open_v1');
  _wirePresetCollapse('structuredProgramsDetails', 'stillness_programs_open_v1');
  $('methodFilterTabs').addEventListener('click', async e => {
    if (!e.target.dataset.filter) return;
    const cat = e.target.dataset.filter;
    // Practice-unlock gating: block locked categories
    if (cat === 'rapid' || cat === 'advanced') {
      const count = await getSessionCount();
      const threshold = cat === 'rapid' ? 3 : 7;
      if (count < threshold) {
        notify.info(`${cat.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + cat.slice(1)} methods unlock after ${threshold} completed sessions (${count} so far).`);
        return;
      }
    }
    state.methodFilter = cat;
    document.querySelectorAll('#methodFilterTabs .filter-tab').forEach(t => t.classList.toggle('active', t.dataset.filter === state.methodFilter));
    renderMethodGrid();
  });

  // Step 3
  $('intentionType').addEventListener('change', () => { updateIntentionHint(); saveUserSettings(); });
  $('intentionInput').addEventListener('input', () => { hideCrafted(); updateStepUI(); saveUserSettings(); });
  // Why-this-session tag chips. Toggle on click. Stored on state._sessionTags
  // as a Set, persisted into history[0].sessionTags at finishSession time.
  // Cleared by resetWizardForNewSession so each session is freshly tagged.
  if (!state._sessionTags) state._sessionTags = new Set();
  document.querySelectorAll('#sessionTagChips .session-tag-chip').forEach(chip => {
    chip.addEventListener('click', () => {
      const tag = chip.dataset.tag;
      if (state._sessionTags.has(tag)) {
        state._sessionTags.delete(tag);
        chip.classList.remove('selected');
      } else {
        state._sessionTags.add(tag);
        chip.classList.add('selected');
      }
    });
  });

  // Custom tags — user-defined chip vocabulary. Lives in IDB so it
  // persists across reloads. Normalized lowercase + spaces collapsed.
  // Cap 20 tags to keep the UI compact.
  const CUSTOM_TAGS_KEY = 'stillness_custom_tags_v1';
  const CUSTOM_TAGS_CAP = 20;
  function normalizeTag(s) {
    return String(s || '').toLowerCase().trim().replace(/\s+/g, ' ').slice(0, 30);
  }
  async function loadCustomTags() {
    try { return (await idbGet(CUSTOM_TAGS_KEY)) || []; } catch { return []; }
  }
  async function saveCustomTags(arr) {
    try { await idbSet(CUSTOM_TAGS_KEY, (arr || []).slice(0, CUSTOM_TAGS_CAP)); } catch {}
  }
  async function renderCustomTagChips() {
    const wrap = $('customTagChips');
    if (!wrap) return;
    const tags = await loadCustomTags();
    if (!tags.length) { wrap.innerHTML = ''; return; }
    wrap.innerHTML = tags.map(t => {
      const isSelected = state._sessionTags?.has(t);
      const safe = escapeHtml(t);
      return `<button type="button" class="session-tag-chip${isSelected ? ' selected' : ''}" data-tag="${safe}" data-custom="1" style="padding-right:6px;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:4px">${safe}<span class="custom-tag-x" data-del="${safe}" title="Remove tag" style="opacity:0.5;cursor:pointer;font-size:0.78rem;line-height:1">×</span></button>`;
    }).join('');
  }
  // Render once on init from saved tags.
  renderCustomTagChips().catch(() => {});
  // Click delegation on the custom chip wrapper — toggle on chip body,
  // delete on the × icon.
  $('customTagChips')?.addEventListener('click', async (e) => {
    const delEl = e.target.closest('[data-del]');
    if (delEl) {
      e.stopPropagation();
      const tag = delEl.dataset.del;
      const tags = await loadCustomTags();
      const next = tags.filter(t => t !== tag);
      await saveCustomTags(next);
      state._sessionTags?.delete(tag);
      await renderCustomTagChips();
      return;
    }
    const chipEl = e.target.closest('.session-tag-chip');
    if (!chipEl) return;
    const tag = chipEl.dataset.tag;
    if (state._sessionTags.has(tag)) {
      state._sessionTags.delete(tag);
      chipEl.classList.remove('selected');
    } else {
      state._sessionTags.add(tag);
      chipEl.classList.add('selected');
    }
  });
  // Add button + Enter-key handler on the input.
  async function _addCustomTag() {
    const input = $('customTagInput');
    if (!input) return;
    const raw = normalizeTag(input.value);
    if (!raw) return;
    const tags = await loadCustomTags();
    if (tags.includes(raw)) {
      input.value = '';
      notify.info('Tag already exists.');
      return;
    }
    if (tags.length >= CUSTOM_TAGS_CAP) {
      notify.warn(`You can keep up to ${CUSTOM_TAGS_CAP} custom tags. Remove one to add another.`);
      return;
    }
    tags.push(raw);
    await saveCustomTags(tags);
    input.value = '';
    state._sessionTags.add(raw); // auto-select the just-added tag
    await renderCustomTagChips();
  }
  $('customTagAddBtn')?.addEventListener('click', _addCustomTag);
  $('customTagInput')?.addEventListener('keydown', e => {
    if (e.key === 'Enter') { e.preventDefault(); _addCustomTag(); }
  });

  $('userAffirmations')?.addEventListener('input', () => { saveUserSettings(); updateStepUI(); markFeatureUsed(FEAT.AFFIRMATIONS); });
  $('affirmationMode')?.addEventListener('change', () => { state.affirmationMode = $('affirmationMode').value; saveUserSettings(); });
  $('craftBtn').addEventListener('click', craftSuggestion);
  $('recraftBtn').addEventListener('click', craftSuggestion);
  $('editCraftedBtn').addEventListener('click', toggleEditCrafted);
  $('saveEditBtn').addEventListener('click', saveEditCrafted);

  // Step 5 — audio controls
  $('lengthSelect').addEventListener('change', () => { state.length = $('lengthSelect').value; hideScript(); saveUserSettings(); });

  // Local AI voice toggle (Phase 6 — Hugging Face SpeechT5 in browser)
  $('localVoiceToggle')?.addEventListener('change', async (e) => {
    const on = e.target.checked;
    state.useLocalTTS = on;
    saveUserSettings();
    const status = $('localVoiceStatus');
    const speakerSel = $('localVoiceSpeaker');
    const actions = $('localVoiceActions');
    if (!on) {
      _localTTS.enabled = false;
      _localTTS.cancel();
      if (status) status.textContent = 'Disabled. The system voice above will be used.';
      if (speakerSel) speakerSel.style.display = 'none';
      if (actions) actions.style.display = 'none';
      return;
    }
    _localTTS.enabled = true;
    if (status) status.textContent = 'Loading… first-time download is ~80 MB. Subsequent loads are instant.';
    if (speakerSel) speakerSel.style.display = '';
    if (actions) actions.style.display = 'none';
    notify.info('Local AI voice — downloading model (~80 MB on first use). You can keep using the app while it loads.', 7000);
    const ok = await _localTTS.init(state.localVoiceSpeaker || 'clb');
    if (!ok) {
      // Loading failed — uncheck and revert; reveal retry button.
      e.target.checked = false;
      state.useLocalTTS = false;
      saveUserSettings();
      if (speakerSel) speakerSel.style.display = 'none';
      if (actions) actions.style.display = '';
      notify.warn('Local AI voice download failed. Tap "retry download" to try again, or keep using the system voice.', 9000);
    } else {
      if (status) status.textContent = '✓ Ready. Local AI voice will be used for the next session.';
      if (actions) actions.style.display = 'none';
      notify.success('Local AI voice ready — will be used for the next session.', 5000);
    }
  });

  // Retry button — re-runs the same init flow without requiring the user
  // to toggle the checkbox off and back on.
  $('localVoiceRetryBtn')?.addEventListener('click', async () => {
    const toggle = $('localVoiceToggle');
    const status = $('localVoiceStatus');
    const speakerSel = $('localVoiceSpeaker');
    const actions = $('localVoiceActions');
    if (!toggle) return;
    toggle.checked = true;
    state.useLocalTTS = true;
    _localTTS.enabled = true;
    if (status) status.textContent = 'Retrying download…';
    if (speakerSel) speakerSel.style.display = '';
    if (actions) actions.style.display = 'none';
    notify.info('Retrying local voice download…', 5000);
    const ok = await _localTTS.init(state.localVoiceSpeaker || 'clb');
    if (!ok) {
      toggle.checked = false;
      state.useLocalTTS = false;
      if (speakerSel) speakerSel.style.display = 'none';
      if (actions) actions.style.display = '';
      notify.warn('Local AI voice download failed again. Check your connection or keep using the system voice.', 9000);
    } else {
      if (status) status.textContent = '✓ Ready. Local AI voice will be used for the next session.';
      if (actions) actions.style.display = 'none';
      notify.success('Local AI voice ready.', 5000);
      saveUserSettings();
    }
  });
  $('localVoiceSpeaker')?.addEventListener('change', async (e) => {
    state.localVoiceSpeaker = e.target.value;
    saveUserSettings();
    if (_localTTS.ready) {
      // Re-init with new speaker — only re-fetches the small embedding (~2KB),
      // not the full model
      await _localTTS.init(e.target.value);
    }
  });
  $('soundscapeSelect')?.addEventListener('change', e => {
    state.soundscape = e.target.value;
    state.droneEnabled = e.target.value !== 'none';
    state._soundscapeOverridden = true; // don't auto-override if user later changes method
    saveUserSettings();
    _refreshSoundscapeHint();
  });

  /** Update the soundscape sublabel based on the current selection and
   *  whether audio/viz safeties are relaxed. Standalone helper so the
   *  age-field handler can call it without triggering save side-effects. */
  function _refreshSoundscapeHint() {
    const hint = $('soundscapeHint');
    if (!hint) return;
    const ss = $('soundscapeSelect');
    const value = ss?.value || state.soundscape;
    const relaxed = (typeof _audioVizSafetiesRelaxed === 'function') && _audioVizSafetiesRelaxed();
    if (value === 'binaural') {
      hint.textContent = relaxed
        ? 'Binaural beats — best with stereo headphones. Phase-locked frequency map ramps per session phase.'
        : '⚠ Binaural beats require stereo headphones. Efficacy is contested in peer-reviewed literature.';
    } else if (value === 'isochronic') {
      hint.textContent = relaxed
        ? 'Isochronic tones — amplitude-modulated, works on any speaker. Phase-locked frequency map ramps per session phase.'
        : 'Isochronic tones — amplitude-modulated entrainment that works on any speaker (no headphones needed). Efficacy is contested in peer-reviewed literature.';
    } else {
      hint.textContent = 'Procedurally generated — never loops. Use headphones for best experience.';
    }
  }
  $('droneVolume').addEventListener('input', e => {
    state.droneVolume = parseInt(e.target.value,10)/100; drone.setVolume(state.droneVolume);
    const v = $('droneVolVal'); if (v) v.textContent = e.target.value;
    saveUserSettings();
  });
  $('speechRate').addEventListener('input', e => {
    state.speechRate = parseInt(e.target.value,10)/100;
    const v = $('speechRateVal'); if (v) v.textContent = (parseInt(e.target.value,10)/100).toFixed(2) + '×';
    saveUserSettings();
  });
  $('voicePitch')?.addEventListener('input', e => {
    state.voicePitch = parseInt(e.target.value,10)/100;
    const v = $('voicePitchVal'); if (v) v.textContent = (parseInt(e.target.value,10)/100).toFixed(2);
    saveUserSettings();
  });
  $('voiceVolume')?.addEventListener('input', e => {
    state.voiceVolume = parseInt(e.target.value,10)/100;
    const v = $('voiceVolVal'); if (v) v.textContent = e.target.value;
    saveUserSettings();
  });
  $('tempoSlider')?.addEventListener('input', e => {
    state.tempoMultiplier = parseInt(e.target.value, 10) / 100;
    const v = $('tempoVal'); if (v) v.textContent = state.tempoMultiplier.toFixed(1) + '×';
    saveUserSettings();
  });

  // Step 5 — visual controls
  $('vizSelect')?.addEventListener('change', async e => {
    const newValue = e.target.value;
    // One-time photosensitivity acknowledgement for the gamma-flicker
    // option. Only gates when the user hasn't set a profile age — i.e.
    // a casual / drive-by user. Engaged adults skip the modal. The
    // conservative renderer (5-15% alpha, 45% radius, cyan palette,
    // reduced-motion fallback) is the actual safety; the modal was
    // belt-and-suspenders.
    if (newValue === 'gamma-flicker' && !_audioVizSafetiesRelaxed()) {
      const ackKey = 'stillness_gamma_flicker_ack_v1';
      if (!localStorage.getItem(ackKey)) {
        const ok = await confirmAsync(
          '40Hz gamma flicker is experimental. The implementation is conservative — only a soft centered pulse, low-contrast cyan, well under standard photosensitive thresholds — but if you have epilepsy, photosensitivity, migraine triggered by flicker, or any history of seizures, do not enable this. The visualizer auto-falls-back to a slow breath rhythm if your OS reports prefers-reduced-motion.\n\nSet your profile age to skip this prompt in future. You understand and want to enable it?'
        );
        if (!ok) {
          // Revert to previous value. state.vizOverride still holds the
          // pre-change value at this point.
          e.target.value = state.vizOverride || 'auto';
          return;
        }
        try { localStorage.setItem(ackKey, '1'); } catch {}
      }
    }
    state.vizOverride = newValue;
    saveUserSettings();
  });

  // Audio reactivity — segmented control click handler (delegated).
  // setAudioReactiveMode() syncs the active class on ALL [data-audio-mode]
  // buttons so the Step 5 + Live panel controls stay in lockstep.
  $('audioReactiveSeg')?.addEventListener('click', e => {
    const btn = e.target.closest('button[data-audio-mode]');
    if (!btn) return;
    setAudioReactiveMode(btn.dataset.audioMode);
    saveUserSettings();
  });

  // Step 5 — HUD element toggles
  ['cfgFixationDot','cfgTextDisplay','cfgPhaseDots','cfgPhaseLabel','cfgProgressBar','cfgSessionTime','cfgLabels'].forEach(id => {
    $(id)?.addEventListener('change', e => {
      const key = id.replace('cfg','').replace(/^./, c => c.toLowerCase());
      // Map checkbox IDs to state.hud keys
      const keyMap = { fixationDot:'fixationDot', textDisplay:'textDisplay', phaseDots:'phaseDots', phaseLabel:'phaseLabel', progressBar:'progressBar', sessionTime:'sessionTime', labels:'labels' };
      const stateKey = keyMap[key];
      if (stateKey) state.hud[stateKey] = e.target.checked;
      saveUserSettings();
    });
  });

  // Step 5 — Background source handlers
  $('bgSourceSelect')?.addEventListener('change', e => {
    state.bgSource = e.target.value;
    bgEngine.source = e.target.value;
    document.querySelectorAll('.bg-options').forEach(el => el.style.display = 'none');
    const optMap = { ai: 'bgAiOptions', 'local-image': 'bgLocalOptions', 'local-video': 'bgLocalOptions', youtube: 'bgYoutubeOptions', url: 'bgUrlOptions' };
    const target = optMap[e.target.value];
    if (target) $(target).style.display = '';
    // Visibility row applies to every source EXCEPT 'none' (no bg = no opacity to set)
    const visRow = $('bgVisibilityRow');
    if (visRow) visRow.style.display = (e.target.value && e.target.value !== 'none') ? '' : 'none';
    saveUserSettings();
  });
  $('bgPromptInput')?.addEventListener('input', e => {
    state.bgPrompt = e.target.value;
    bgEngine.prompt = e.target.value;
    saveUserSettings();
  });
  $('bgNegativePromptInput')?.addEventListener('input', e => {
    state.bgNegativePrompt = e.target.value;
    saveUserSettings();
  });
  $('bgOrientationSelect')?.addEventListener('change', e => {
    state.bgOrientation = e.target.value;
    saveUserSettings();
  });
  $('bgGuidanceSlider')?.addEventListener('input', e => {
    state.bgGuidance = Number(e.target.value);
    const lbl = $('bgGuidanceVal'); if (lbl) lbl.textContent = state.bgGuidance;
  });
  $('bgGuidanceSlider')?.addEventListener('change', saveUserSettings);
  $('bgStepsSlider')?.addEventListener('input', e => {
    state.bgSteps = Number(e.target.value);
    const lbl = $('bgStepsVal'); if (lbl) lbl.textContent = state.bgSteps;
  });
  $('bgStepsSlider')?.addEventListener('change', saveUserSettings);

  // ── Playback + transition controls (backported from Slideshow) ──
  function buildBgTransitionGrid() {
    const grid = $('bgTransitionGrid');
    if (!grid) return;
    const enabled = new Set(state.bgEnabledTransitions || BG_DEFAULT_ENABLED);
    grid.innerHTML = Object.keys(BG_TRANSITIONS).map(k => {
      const checked = enabled.has(k) ? ' checked' : '';
      return `<label>
        <input type="checkbox" value="${k}"${checked}>
        <span>${BG_TRANSITIONS[k].label}</span>
      </label>`;
    }).join('');
  }
  function syncBgEnabledFromGrid() {
    const boxes = document.querySelectorAll('#bgTransitionGrid input[type="checkbox"]');
    state.bgEnabledTransitions = Array.from(boxes).filter(b => b.checked).map(b => b.value);
    saveUserSettings();
  }
  buildBgTransitionGrid();

  $('bgTransitionGrid')?.addEventListener('change', syncBgEnabledFromGrid);
  $('bgTxAll')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
    document.querySelectorAll('#bgTransitionGrid input[type="checkbox"]').forEach(b => b.checked = true);
    syncBgEnabledFromGrid();
  });
  $('bgTxNone')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
    document.querySelectorAll('#bgTransitionGrid input[type="checkbox"]').forEach(b => b.checked = false);
    syncBgEnabledFromGrid();
  });
  $('bgTxInvert')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
    document.querySelectorAll('#bgTransitionGrid input[type="checkbox"]').forEach(b => b.checked = !b.checked);
    syncBgEnabledFromGrid();
  });

  $('bgOrderSeg')?.addEventListener('click', e => {
    const btn = e.target.closest('button[data-order]');
    if (!btn) return;
    state.bgPlaybackOrder = btn.dataset.order;
    $('bgOrderSeg').querySelectorAll('button').forEach(b => b.classList.toggle('active', b === btn));
    saveUserSettings();
  });

  $('bgRotationSlider')?.addEventListener('input', e => {
    state.bgRotationSec = Number(e.target.value);
    const lbl = $('bgRotationVal'); if (lbl) lbl.textContent = state.bgRotationSec;
    const hint = $('bgRotationHint'); if (hint) hint.textContent = state.bgRotationSec;
  });
  $('bgRotationSlider')?.addEventListener('change', saveUserSettings);

  $('bgTransitionDurSlider')?.addEventListener('input', e => {
    state.bgTransitionDuration = Number(e.target.value);
    const lbl = $('bgTransitionDurVal'); if (lbl) lbl.textContent = state.bgTransitionDuration.toFixed(1);
  });
  $('bgTransitionDurSlider')?.addEventListener('change', saveUserSettings);

  // ── Background image generation queue system ──
  // _bgQueuePending = images queued but not yet started
  // bgEngine.activeGenerations = images currently being generated
  // The runner drains _bgQueuePending by launching generations up to BG_MAX_PARALLEL at a time.
  let _bgQueuePending = 0;
  let _bgQueueRunning = false;

  function _bgUpdateQueueUI() {
    const statusEl = $('bgQueueStatus');
    const removeBtn = $('bgRemoveQueuedBtn');
    const clearBtn = $('bgClearQueueBtn');
    const total = _bgQueuePending + bgEngine.activeGenerations;
    if (total > 0) {
      if (statusEl) {
        const parts = [];
        if (_bgQueuePending > 0) parts.push(`${_bgQueuePending} queued`);
        if (bgEngine.activeGenerations > 0) parts.push(`${bgEngine.activeGenerations} generating`);
        statusEl.textContent = parts.join(' · ');
        statusEl.style.display = '';
      }
      if (removeBtn) removeBtn.style.display = '';
      // Clear-queue button only shown when there's queued work to drop.
      // (Active-generation can't be cancelled mid-flight; wait it out.)
      if (clearBtn) clearBtn.style.display = _bgQueuePending > 0 ? '' : 'none';
    } else {
      if (statusEl) statusEl.style.display = 'none';
      if (removeBtn) removeBtn.style.display = 'none';
      if (clearBtn) clearBtn.style.display = 'none';
    }
    // Button labels stay stable; the queue counter beside them is the
    // signal of in-flight work.
    const btn = $('bgPreviewBtn');
    const batchBtn = $('bgPreviewBatchBtn');
    if (btn) btn.textContent = '+1 image';
    if (batchBtn) batchBtn.textContent = '+5 images';
  }

  async function _bgQueueRunner() {
    if (_bgQueueRunning) return; // already draining
    _bgQueueRunning = true;
    const wrap = $('bgPreviewWrap');
    const status = $('bgPreviewStatus');
    const saveBtn = $('bgSaveLastBtn');
    if (wrap) wrap.style.display = '';
    _galleryOpen = true; // inline gallery is now visible — keep it live
    bgEngine.prompt = $('bgPromptInput')?.value || '';
    while (_bgQueuePending > 0) {
      // Launch up to BG_MAX_PARALLEL at a time
      const batch = Math.min(_bgQueuePending, BG_MAX_PARALLEL - bgEngine.activeGenerations);
      if (batch <= 0) {
        // All slots busy — wait for one to free up
        await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 200));
        _bgUpdateQueueUI();
        continue;
      }
      _bgQueuePending -= batch;
      _bgUpdateQueueUI();
      if (status) status.textContent = 'Sending to Perchance AI... (typically 10-30 seconds)';
      const promises = Array.from({ length: batch }, () =>
        bgEngine.generateOne().then(url => {
          _bgUpdateQueueUI();
          if (url && saveBtn) saveBtn.style.display = '';
          // Re-render the inline gallery as each image arrives — image is
          // already in the bg-cache by this point, so the gallery picks it
          // up via its sort+filter pipeline (with all action buttons,
          // unlike the previous raw-<img> append which had none).
          renderBgGallery();
          return url;
        })
      );
      await Promise.all(promises);
      // Update status after each micro-batch
      const manifest = await bgCacheGetManifest();
      const el = $('bgCacheCount'); if (el) el.textContent = manifest.length;
      if (status) {
        const remaining = _bgQueuePending + bgEngine.activeGenerations;
        status.textContent = remaining > 0
          ? `${manifest.length} image${manifest.length === 1 ? '' : 's'} in cache. ${remaining} remaining...`
          : `Done. ${manifest.length} image${manifest.length === 1 ? '' : 's'} in cache.`;
      }
      renderBgGallery();
    }
    _bgUpdateQueueUI();
    _bgQueueRunning = false;
    // Final status
    if (status && bgEngine.activeGenerations === 0) {
      const manifest = await bgCacheGetManifest();
      if (manifest.length > 0) {
        status.textContent = `Done. ${manifest.length} image${manifest.length === 1 ? '' : 's'} in cache.`;
        // User-visible toast — only when actually completing a non-trivial
        // batch (avoids noise from no-op completions). Auto-suppressed
        // during session playback by the notify wrapper.
        if (_bgQueueLastTotal > 0) {
          notify.success(`Image pool ready — ${manifest.length} image${manifest.length === 1 ? '' : 's'} in cache.`);
          _bgQueueLastTotal = 0;
        }
      } else {
        status.textContent = typeof root !== 'undefined' && root.textToImagePlugin
          ? 'Generation failed — server may be busy. Try again.'
          : 'Plugin not found. Add textToImagePlugin = ' + '\u007B' + 'import:text-to-image-plugin' + '\u007D' + ' to the top editor.';
      }
    }
  }

  // Tracks the highest pending count seen during the current drain so the
  // completion toast only fires once per batch, not per micro-step.
  let _bgQueueLastTotal = 0;

  function _bgQueueAdd(count) {
    _bgQueuePending += count;
    _bgQueueLastTotal = Math.max(_bgQueueLastTotal, _bgQueuePending);
    _bgUpdateQueueUI();
    _bgQueueRunner(); // start draining if not already running
  }

  function _bgQueueRemove() {
    if (_bgQueuePending > 0) {
      _bgQueuePending--;
      _bgUpdateQueueUI();
      if (_bgQueuePending === 0 && bgEngine.activeGenerations === 0) {
        const status = $('bgPreviewStatus');
        if (status) status.textContent = 'Queue cleared.';
      }
    }
  }

  // ── Prompt enhancer ───────────────────────────────────────────────
  // Adapted from promptyx PROMPT_INSTRUCTIONS. Transforms a casual user
  // input into an optimized AI image generation prompt at the requested
  // verbosity. Streams back into the textarea so the user sees it
  // appear; clicking the button again while running cancels via the
  // generation token.
  const BG_ENHANCE_INSTRUCTIONS = {
    short: `ROLE: Expert AI image prompt engineer.
ACTION: Transform the input into a concise, optimized AI image generation prompt (300-600 chars).
FORMAT: Comma-separated precise visual descriptors only.
ENHANCE WITH: specific lighting type, camera angle/lens, primary color palette, key material/texture detail, mood/atmosphere word, one compositional technique.
FORBIDDEN: 8K, UHD, hyperrealism, "extreme detail", explanatory sentences, question marks, quotes around the result.
OUTPUT: ONLY the final raw prompt string. No preamble. No quotes. No "Here's your prompt:" or similar.`,
    medium: `ROLE: Expert AI image prompt engineer.
ACTION: Transform the input into a richly-detailed AI image generation prompt (600-1100 chars).
FORMAT: Comma-separated visual descriptors with moderate depth.
ENHANCE WITH: specific lighting setup, focal length/camera type, 2-3 color palette descriptors, multiple surface textures, spatial composition (foreground/midground/background), atmosphere/weather, time of day, style anchor (one artist or aesthetic reference).
FORBIDDEN: 8K, UHD, hyperrealism, "extreme detail", narration, instructional language, quotes around the result.
OUTPUT: ONLY the final raw prompt string. No preamble. No quotes.`,
    long: `ROLE: Expert AI image prompt engineer.
ACTION: Transform the input into a comprehensive, cinematic-quality AI image generation prompt (1100-1600 chars).
FORMAT: Flowing comma-separated visual descriptors at maximum fidelity.
ENHANCE WITH: complex multi-source lighting rig, specific lens + aperture + film stock, exhaustive color grading descriptor, layered texture details (micro and macro), full environmental world-building (weather + time + season + location), subject details, composition framing technique, emotional/psychological undertone, 1-2 specific artist/film/art-movement references.
FORBIDDEN: 8K, UHD, hyperrealism, "extreme detail", storytelling prose, instructional text, quotes around the result.
OUTPUT: ONLY the final raw prompt string. No preamble. No quotes.`,
  };

  let _bgEnhanceToken = 0;
  let _bgEnhanceRunning = false;

  $('bgEnhanceBtn')?.addEventListener('click', async () => {
    const btn = $('bgEnhanceBtn');
    const input = $('bgPromptInput');
    if (!btn || !input) return;
    // Toggle-cancel if already running
    if (_bgEnhanceRunning) {
      _bgEnhanceToken++;
      _bgEnhanceRunning = false;
      btn.disabled = false;
      btn.textContent = '✨ enhance';
      return;
    }
    const userInput = (input.value || '').trim();
    if (!userInput) {
      notify.info('Type a casual idea in the prompt box first — I\'ll engineer it into an optimized image prompt.');
      return;
    }
    const length = $('bgEnhanceLength')?.value || 'medium';
    const instr = BG_ENHANCE_INSTRUCTIONS[length] || BG_ENHANCE_INSTRUCTIONS.medium;
    const myToken = ++_bgEnhanceToken;
    _bgEnhanceRunning = true;
    btn.textContent = '⏹ stop';
    const original = userInput;
    input.value = '';
    let acc = '';
    try {
      const result = await aiGenerate(`${instr}\n\nUser Input: ${original}`, {
        source: 'bg-prompt-enhance',
        onChunk: (data) => {
          if (myToken !== _bgEnhanceToken) {
            // cancelled
            throw new Error('cancelled');
          }
          acc += data.textChunk || '';
          input.value = acc;
        },
      });
      if (myToken !== _bgEnhanceToken) return;
      // Non-streaming providers (Anthropic / OpenAI) return the whole
      // text in result.generatedText; streaming Perchance accumulates
      // via onChunk above. Pick whichever's non-empty.
      const finalText = (acc || result?.generatedText || '').trim();
      if (!finalText) {
        input.value = original;
        notify.warn('Prompt enhance returned nothing — your original text was kept.');
        return;
      }
      // Tidy: strip stray surrounding quotes that some models add despite instructions
      const cleaned = finalText.replace(/^["']|["']$/g, '');
      input.value = cleaned;
      notify.success(`Prompt enhanced (${length}).`);
    } catch (e) {
      if (e?.message === 'cancelled') {
        // Restore original on cancel so user doesn't lose their starting text
        input.value = original;
        notify.info('Enhance cancelled — original prompt restored.');
      } else {
        // Restore original on failure too
        input.value = original;
        console.warn('[bg-enhance] failed:', e);
        notify.warn('Prompt enhance failed — your original text was kept.');
      }
    } finally {
      if (myToken === _bgEnhanceToken) {
        _bgEnhanceRunning = false;
        btn.disabled = false;
        btn.textContent = '✨ enhance';
        // Trigger save so the enhanced prompt persists
        saveUserSettings();
      }
    }
  });

  $('bgPreviewBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => _bgQueueAdd(1));
  $('bgPreviewBatchBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => _bgQueueAdd(5));
  $('bgRemoveQueuedBtn')?.addEventListener('click', _bgQueueRemove);
  $('bgClearQueueBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
    if (_bgQueuePending <= 0) return;
    const dropped = _bgQueuePending;
    _bgQueuePending = 0;
    _bgUpdateQueueUI();
    const status = $('bgPreviewStatus');
    if (status) status.textContent = `Queue cleared (${dropped} dropped). Active generations will finish.`;
    notify.info(`Queue cleared — ${dropped} pending generation${dropped === 1 ? '' : 's'} dropped.`);
  });
  $('bgAutoGenToggle')?.addEventListener('change', e => { state.bgAutoGen = e.target.checked; saveUserSettings(); });
  $('bgSaveLastBtn')?.addEventListener('click', async () => {
    const manifest = await bgCacheGetManifest();
    if (manifest.length > 0) {
      await bgCacheDownload(manifest[manifest.length - 1].id);
      notify.success('Image saved to your device.');
    }
  });
  // bgManageBtn now toggles the inline gallery panel — there is no modal
  // anymore. When opened we always render fresh; when closed we mark
  // _galleryOpen=false so background-cache mutations don't trigger renders
  // against a hidden panel.
  $('bgManageBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
    const wrap = $('bgPreviewWrap');
    const btn  = $('bgManageBtn');
    if (!wrap) return;
    // Use _galleryOpen as source of truth — checking wrap.style.display
    // is unreliable because after first open it becomes '' (empty
    // string), and `!''` evaluates to true, which falsely flagged
    // every subsequent click as "opening" again.
    const opening = !_galleryOpen;
    wrap.style.display = opening ? '' : 'none';
    _galleryOpen = opening;
    if (btn) {
      // Preserve the bgCacheCount span — only swap the leading verb.
      const countEl = $('bgCacheCount');
      const count = countEl ? countEl.outerHTML : '';
      btn.innerHTML = (opening ? 'hide gallery (' : 'show gallery (') + count + ')';
    }
    if (opening) renderBgGallery();
  });
  // Sort dropdown — persist choice, re-render with new ordering.
  $('bgGallerySortSelect')?.addEventListener('change', (e) => {
    state.bgGallerySort = e.target.value || 'newest';
    try { saveUserSettings(); } catch (err) {}
    renderBgGallery();
  });
  // Favorites-only filter toggle — also persisted so it survives reopen.
  $('bgGalleryFavFilterBtn')?.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
    state.bgGalleryFavOnly = !state.bgGalleryFavOnly;
    try { saveUserSettings(); } catch (err) {}
    renderBgGallery();
  });
  $('bgClearAllBtn')?.addEventListener('click', async () => {
    if (!await confirmAsync('Clear all cached background images?')) return;
    await bgCacheClear(); renderBgGallery(); notify.info('Background cache cleared.');
  });
  $('bgDownloadAllBtn')?.addEventListener('click', async () => {
    const manifest = await bgCacheGetManifest();
    if (!manifest.length) { notify.info('No images to download.'); return; }
    notify.info(`Downloading ${manifest.length} image${manifest.length === 1 ? '' : 's'}...`);
    for (const entry of manifest) {
      await bgCacheDownload(entry.id);
      await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 300)); // stagger to avoid browser blocking
    }
  });
  // Build the style preset chips once on page setup. Reads
  // state.bgActiveStylePresetIds (which loadUserSettings restores from previous
  // session, if any) so previously-selected chips render in the active state.
  try { buildBgStyleChips(); } catch (e) { console.warn('buildBgStyleChips:', e); }
  $('bgFileInput')?.addEventListener('change', e => {
    const file = e.target.files?.[0];
    if (!file) return;
    $('bgFileName').textContent = file.name;
    state._bgFile = file;
    saveUserSettings();
  });
  $('bgYoutubeUrl')?.addEventListener('input', e => { state.bgYoutubeUrl = e.target.value; saveUserSettings(); });
  $('bgUrlInput')?.addEventListener('input', e => { state.bgStaticUrl = e.target.value; saveUserSettings(); });

  // Slider batch save — fires only on release (change), not every drag tick (input)
  ['speechRate', 'voicePitch', 'voiceVolume', 'droneVolume'].forEach(id => {
    $(id)?.addEventListener('change', () => saveUserSettings());
  });

  // Ducking toggle
  $('duckingToggle')?.addEventListener('change', e => {
    state.duckingEnabled = e.target.checked;
    saveUserSettings();
  });

  // Visual effect tuning sliders
  // Viz tuning sliders
  [['vizSpeed','speed','×',1],['vizIntensity','intensity','×',1],['vizComplexity','complexity','×',1],['vizTrail','trail','',2]].forEach(([id, key, suffix, decimals]) => {
    $(id)?.addEventListener('input', e => {
      state.vizSettings[key] = parseInt(e.target.value, 10) / 100;
      const v = $(id + 'Val'); if (v) v.textContent = state.vizSettings[key].toFixed(decimals) + suffix;
    });
    $(id)?.addEventListener('change', () => saveUserSettings());
  });

  // Color picker — store explicit hex on `input` (live), persist on `change`
  // (release). The color is read fresh by setupVisual / startVizPreview each
  // frame so the running effect reflects the new color on the very next tick.
  $('vizColorPicker')?.addEventListener('input', e => {
    state.vizColor = e.target.value;
    const v = $('vizColorVal'); if (v) v.textContent = e.target.value.toLowerCase();
  });
  $('vizColorPicker')?.addEventListener('change', () => saveUserSettings());
  // Reset button — drop the override so renderers fall back to --accent.
  // Restoring the picker's displayed swatch to the accent value gives the user
  // a visible confirmation that "× reset" did something.
  $('vizColorReset')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
    state.vizColor = null;
    const accent = (getComputedStyle(document.documentElement).getPropertyValue('--accent').trim() || '#6b94b8').toLowerCase();
    const picker = $('vizColorPicker'); if (picker) picker.value = accent;
    const v = $('vizColorVal'); if (v) v.textContent = 'accent';
    saveUserSettings();
  });
  // Step 6 — Generate & Begin
  $('generateScriptBtn').addEventListener('click', generateFullScript);
  $('regenScriptBtn').addEventListener('click', regenerateFailedChunks);
  // Regenerate-fresh: user pastes or manually edits a script then wants
  // a fresh AI generation against their current Steps 1-4 inputs. Asks
  // for SD mode explicitly per call so the user can see what context
  // (profile, memory, adaptive) gets pulled in for this one regeneration
  // — without permanently toggling their Smart Director setting.
  $('regenFreshBtn')?.addEventListener('click', async () => {
    if (_aiInProgress) { notify.info('AI is already running — wait for it to finish.'); return; }
    // Confirm intent if a script is loaded
    if (state.fullScript) {
      const ok = await confirmAsync(
        'Discard the current script and generate a new one from your intention?\n\nThis uses Steps 1-4 (guide, method, intention, affirmations) but ignores any manual edits to the current script.',
        { okText: 'continue', cancelText: 'cancel' }
      );
      if (!ok) return;
    }
    // Mode picker — Smart Director vs defaults. Three-button row in the modal.
    const modePromise = new Promise(resolve => {
      const backdrop = document.createElement('div');
      backdrop.className = 'modal-backdrop visible';
      const sdLabel = state.smartDirectorEnabled !== false ? 'on' : 'off';
      backdrop.innerHTML = `<div class="modal" style="max-width:480px">
        <h2 style="margin:0 0 10px">regeneration mode</h2>
        <div style="font-size:0.84rem;line-height:1.55;color:var(--text-dim);margin-bottom:14px">
          <strong>Smart Director (your current setting: ${sdLabel}):</strong> uses your profile, recent memory digests, adaptive recommendations, and any director calibration to personalize the script.<br><br>
          <strong>Defaults only:</strong> ignores all personalization. Generates against the persona/method/intention/affirmations alone — useful for sharing or for a clean baseline.
        </div>
        <div class="modal-actions" style="margin-top:8px;flex-wrap:wrap">
          <button class="btn secondary" id="_freshCancel">cancel</button>
          <button class="btn secondary" id="_freshDefaults">defaults only</button>
          <button class="btn" id="_freshSmart">smart director</button>
        </div>
      </div>`;
      document.body.appendChild(backdrop);
      const cleanup = (val) => { backdrop.remove(); resolve(val); };
      backdrop.querySelector('#_freshCancel').addEventListener('click', () => cleanup(null));
      backdrop.querySelector('#_freshDefaults').addEventListener('click', () => cleanup('defaults'));
      backdrop.querySelector('#_freshSmart').addEventListener('click', () => cleanup('smart'));
      backdrop.addEventListener('click', e => { if (e.target === backdrop) cleanup(null); });
    });
    const mode = await modePromise;
    if (!mode) return;
    // Clear the current script so generateFullScript treats this as a fresh run
    // (it has its own confirm-on-unsaved-edits guard, which we already bypassed
    // via our own confirm above, so wipe state.fullScript first).
    state.fullScript = null;
    state.parsedScript = null;
    state.generatedPhaseOrder = [];
    state.scriptSections = [];
    if ($('scriptText')) $('scriptText').value = '';
    // Per-call SD override — restored in the finally block so the user's
    // persistent setting is unchanged.
    const _prevSD = state.smartDirectorEnabled;
    if (mode === 'defaults') state.smartDirectorEnabled = false;
    if (mode === 'smart')    state.smartDirectorEnabled = true;
    try { await generateFullScript(); }
    finally { state.smartDirectorEnabled = _prevSD; }
  });
  $('exportScriptBtn').addEventListener('click', exportScript);
  $('exportBundleBtn')?.addEventListener('click', exportSessionBundle);
  $('shareConfigBtn')?.addEventListener('click', shareCurrentConfig);

  $('beginBtn')?.addEventListener('click', startSession);
  $('addInductionPhaseBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => addPhaseSection('induction'));
  $('addDeepenerPhaseBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => addPhaseSection('deepener'));
  $('addLevelPhaseBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => addPhaseSection('level'));
  $('addWorkPhaseBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => addPhaseSection('work'));
  $('addAffirmPhaseBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => addPhaseSection('affirm'));
  $('addSoundingPhaseBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => addPhaseSection('sounding'));
  $('addCustomPhaseBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => addPhaseSection('custom'));
  $('addLightenerPhaseBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => addPhaseSection('lightener'));
  $('addWakePhaseBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => addPhaseSection('wake'));
  $('addReintroPhaseBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => addPhaseSection('reintroduction'));

  // Reimagine mode toggle (affects Custom block ✨ buttons)
  document.querySelectorAll('.reimagine-mode-btn').forEach(btn => {
    btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
      const mode = btn.dataset.mode;
      state.reimagineMode = mode;
      saveUserSettings();
      _refreshReimagineModeUI();
    });
  });
  $('normalizePhaseOrderBtn')?.addEventListener('click', resetPhaseOrderToDefault);
  $('undoBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => history.undo());
  $('redoBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => history.redo());

  // Keyboard shortcuts: Ctrl/Cmd+Z = undo, Ctrl/Cmd+Shift+Z = redo.
  // Only fires while Step 4 (script preview / phase editor) is visible AND
  // focus is not inside a textarea/input (users expect native undo there).
  document.addEventListener('keydown', e => {
    if (!(e.ctrlKey || e.metaKey) || e.key.toLowerCase() !== 'z') return;
    const preview = $('scriptPreview');
    if (!preview || !preview.classList.contains('visible')) return;
    const tag = (document.activeElement?.tagName || '').toLowerCase();
    if (tag === 'textarea' || tag === 'input') return; // let native undo win
    e.preventDefault();
    if (e.shiftKey) history.redo(); else history.undo();
  });

  // Pre-session mood emoji buttons
  document.querySelectorAll('.mood-emoji').forEach(btn => {
    btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
      document.querySelectorAll('.mood-emoji').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('selected'));
      btn.classList.add('selected');
      state._preMood = parseInt(btn.dataset.val, 10);
      _updateReadinessScore();
    });
  });
  // Pre-session tension and energy sliders
  $('preTensionSlider')?.addEventListener('input', e => {
    state._preTension = parseInt(e.target.value, 10);
    const el = $('preTensionVal'); if (el) el.textContent = e.target.value;
    _updateReadinessScore();
  });
  $('preEnergySlider')?.addEventListener('input', e => {
    state._preEnergy = parseInt(e.target.value, 10);
    const el = $('preEnergyVal'); if (el) el.textContent = e.target.value;
    _updateReadinessScore();
  });

  // ── Conversational check-in ─────────────────────────────────────────
  // Free-text alternative to the structured emoji + sliders. Parses
  // a short sentence into mood/tension/energy via a keyword lexicon,
  // applies to the existing controls. Each category uses signed weights:
  // negative pulls the value down (toward "low"), positive pulls up.
  // The strongest absolute weight wins per category; categories with no
  // matches are left at their current value so partial sentences work.
  const CHECKIN_LEXICON = {
    mood: [
      // Negative weights pull mood down
      { re: /\b(awful|terrible|miserable|wretched|hopeless|despair|broken)\b/i, w: -4 },
      { re: /\b(sad|down|low|blue|depressed|defeated|despondent|gloomy)\b/i, w: -3 },
      { re: /\b(frustrated|angry|irritated|upset|annoyed|fed up|pissed)\b/i, w: -3 },
      { re: /\b(anxious|worried|scared|nervous|afraid|stressed|panicked)\b/i, w: -2 },
      { re: /\b(meh|so-so|okay-ish|alright-ish|fine i guess)\b/i, w: -1 },
      { re: /\b(neutral|fine|okay|ok|alright)\b/i, w: 0 },
      // Positive weights pull mood up
      { re: /\b(content|peaceful|grounded|settled|steady)\b/i, w: 2 },
      { re: /\b(happy|good|positive|optimistic|hopeful|cheerful)\b/i, w: 3 },
      { re: /\b(great|wonderful|fantastic|amazing|elated|joyful|ecstatic)\b/i, w: 4 },
    ],
    tension: [
      // Negative weights → relaxed end
      { re: /\b(very relaxed|completely relaxed|deeply relaxed|loose)\b/i, w: -4 },
      { re: /\b(relaxed|easy|soft|chill|mellow|loose)\b/i, w: -3 },
      { re: /\b(calm|settled|at ease|peaceful)\b/i, w: -2 },
      { re: /\b(neutral|fine|okay|normal)\b/i, w: 0 },
      // Positive weights → tense end
      { re: /\b(a bit tense|a little tense|somewhat tense|slightly tense)\b/i, w: 1 },
      { re: /\b(tense|tight|wound up|stressed|on edge|stiff)\b/i, w: 3 },
      { re: /\b(very tense|extremely tense|frazzled|wound tight|knotted up|clenched)\b/i, w: 4 },
    ],
    energy: [
      // Negative weights → exhausted end
      { re: /\b(exhausted|drained|depleted|spent|wiped out|fried)\b/i, w: -4 },
      { re: /\b(tired|fatigued|sleepy|drowsy|sluggish|lethargic)\b/i, w: -3 },
      { re: /\b(low energy|kind of tired|a bit tired)\b/i, w: -2 },
      { re: /\b(neutral|fine|okay|normal)\b/i, w: 0 },
      // Positive weights → energized end
      { re: /\b(awake|alert|active|engaged)\b/i, w: 2 },
      { re: /\b(energized|energetic|buzzing|charged)\b/i, w: 3 },
      { re: /\b(wired|racing|amped up|hyped|jacked|jittery|restless mind|mind is racing|racing mind)\b/i, w: 3 },
      { re: /\b(very energized|extremely awake|fully charged)\b/i, w: 4 },
    ],
  };

  function parseCheckinText(text) {
    const out = { mood: null, tension: null, energy: null };
    if (!text || !text.trim()) return out;
    for (const [field, rules] of Object.entries(CHECKIN_LEXICON)) {
      let bestWeight = 0;
      let bestAbs = 0;
      let matched = false;
      for (const { re, w } of rules) {
        if (re.test(text)) {
          matched = true;
          if (Math.abs(w) > bestAbs) { bestAbs = Math.abs(w); bestWeight = w; }
        }
      }
      if (!matched) continue;
      // Map weight (-4..+4) → 1..9 scale.
      // -4 → 1, -3 → 2, -2 → 3, -1 → 4, 0 → 5, 1 → 6, 2 → 7, 3 → 8, 4 → 9
      out[field] = Math.max(1, Math.min(9, 5 + bestWeight));
    }
    return out;
  }

  // ── Post-session conversational check-in ───────────────────────────
  // Mirrors the pre-session lexicon for the three post-session
  // dimensions (mood / alertness / depth). Includes comparative phrasings
  // ("better", "worse", "same as before") because post-session reflection
  // is naturally relative to where the user started. Output range is
  // 1..9 mapped to the 0..10 sliders, leaving 0 and 10 for explicit user
  // override — same convention as the pre-session parser.
  const POST_CHECKIN_LEXICON = {
    mood: [
      // Comparative-negative
      { re: /\b(much worse|terrible|awful|miserable|wretched|hopeless)\b/i, w: -4 },
      { re: /\b(worse|sad|down|low|depressed|defeated|distressed|drained)\b/i, w: -3 },
      { re: /\b(slightly worse|a bit worse|kind of off|a little off)\b/i, w: -2 },
      { re: /\b(anxious|worried|frustrated|irritated|tense after|unsettled)\b/i, w: -1 },
      { re: /\b(neutral|same|fine|okay|ok|alright|unchanged|no change)\b/i, w: 0 },
      // Comparative-positive
      { re: /\b(slightly better|a little better|a bit better|softer|easier)\b/i, w: 1 },
      { re: /\b(better|content|peaceful|grounded|settled|calm|relaxed|relieved|good)\b/i, w: 2 },
      { re: /\b(much better|happy|great|positive|optimistic|hopeful|cheerful|clearer|lighter)\b/i, w: 3 },
      { re: /\b(amazing|wonderful|fantastic|elated|joyful|deeply peaceful|profoundly better|transformed)\b/i, w: 4 },
    ],
    alertness: [
      // Drowsy end
      { re: /\b(barely awake|so tired|exhausted|completely drained|wiped out|fried)\b/i, w: -4 },
      { re: /\b(very drowsy|very sleepy|very tired|drained|nodding off|half-asleep)\b/i, w: -3 },
      { re: /\b(drowsy|sleepy|sluggish|groggy|fuzzy|heavy)\b/i, w: -2 },
      { re: /\b(a bit tired|kind of drowsy|a bit sleepy|a bit sluggish|a little fuzzy)\b/i, w: -1 },
      { re: /\b(neutral|fine|normal|okay)\b/i, w: 0 },
      // Alert end
      { re: /\b(awake|aware|present)\b/i, w: 1 },
      { re: /\b(alert|clear|sharp|focused|crisp)\b/i, w: 2 },
      { re: /\b(very alert|wide awake|fully alert|fully awake|sharp focus)\b/i, w: 3 },
      { re: /\b(extremely alert|hyper-alert|amped up|wired)\b/i, w: 4 },
    ],
    depth: [
      // Surface end
      { re: /\b(didn'?t go (anywhere|deep|under)|stayed (on the )?surface|surface only|barely (went|got) under|just (lying|sitting) there)\b/i, w: -4 },
      { re: /\b(very surface|barely under|distracted the whole time|couldn'?t focus)\b/i, w: -3 },
      { re: /\b(surface|light|shallow|kind of distracted|in my head)\b/i, w: -2 },
      { re: /\b(a bit (light|shallow)|somewhat shallow|partly there)\b/i, w: -1 },
      { re: /\b(neutral|moderate|medium|some(what)?)\b/i, w: 0 },
      // Deep end
      { re: /\b(a little deep|a bit deep|noticeable shift)\b/i, w: 1 },
      { re: /\b(deep|present|absorbed|in it|sunk in|in the zone)\b/i, w: 2 },
      { re: /\b(very deep|deeply absorbed|lost track of time|deeply focused|trance-like)\b/i, w: 3 },
