      { re: /\b(profoundly deep|completely under|profoundly absorbed|extremely deep|forgot myself|lost (in|to) it|deep trance)\b/i, w: 4 },
    ],
  };

  function parsePostCheckinText(text) {
    const out = { mood: null, alertness: null, depth: null };
    if (!text || !text.trim()) return out;
    for (const [field, rules] of Object.entries(POST_CHECKIN_LEXICON)) {
      let bestWeight = 0;
      let bestAbs = 0;
      let matched = false;
      for (const { re, w } of rules) {
        if (re.test(text)) {
          matched = true;
          if (Math.abs(w) > bestAbs) { bestAbs = Math.abs(w); bestWeight = w; }
        }
      }
      if (!matched) continue;
      out[field] = Math.max(1, Math.min(9, 5 + bestWeight));
    }
    return out;
  }

  $('preCheckinTextToggle')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
    const wrap = $('preCheckinTextWrap');
    const tog  = $('preCheckinTextToggle');
    if (!wrap || !tog) return;
    const showing = wrap.style.display !== 'none';
    wrap.style.display = showing ? 'none' : '';
    tog.textContent = showing ? 'type it instead' : 'use sliders instead';
    if (!showing) $('preCheckinText')?.focus();
  });

  $('preCheckinTextApply')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
    const text = $('preCheckinText')?.value || '';
    const parsed = parseCheckinText(text);
    const applied = [];
    if (parsed.mood != null) {
      state._preMood = parsed.mood;
      // Light up matching emoji button by approximating to nearest pip
      document.querySelectorAll('#preMoodEmojis .mood-emoji').forEach(b => {
        const v = parseInt(b.dataset.val, 10);
        b.classList.toggle('selected', Math.abs(v - parsed.mood) <= 1);
      });
      applied.push(`mood ${parsed.mood}/9`);
    }
    if (parsed.tension != null) {
      state._preTension = parsed.tension;
      const el = $('preTensionSlider'); if (el) el.value = String(parsed.tension);
      const ev = $('preTensionVal'); if (ev) ev.textContent = String(parsed.tension);
      applied.push(`tension ${parsed.tension}/9`);
    }
    if (parsed.energy != null) {
      state._preEnergy = parsed.energy;
      const el = $('preEnergySlider'); if (el) el.value = String(parsed.energy);
      const ev = $('preEnergyVal'); if (ev) ev.textContent = String(parsed.energy);
      applied.push(`energy ${parsed.energy}/9`);
    }
    const hint = $('preCheckinTextHint');
    if (hint) {
      if (applied.length) {
        hint.textContent = `parsed → ${applied.join(' · ')}. Adjust the sliders below if anything feels off.`;
        hint.style.color = 'var(--text-dim)';
      } else {
        hint.textContent = 'no clear mood/tension/energy signals found — try mentioning how you feel, how relaxed/tense you are, and your energy level.';
        hint.style.color = 'var(--neon-amber)';
      }
    }
    _updateReadinessScore();
  });

  /** Compute & render the pre-session readiness score from the three pre-checkin
   *  signals. Mood + energy contribute positively; tension inverts (high tension
   *  is depleting). Output is clamped 0-10. Hint text shifts by score band so
   *  the user sees a soft guideline for what session shape will likely fit. */
  function _updateReadinessScore() {
    const scoreEl = $('readinessScore');
    const hintEl  = $('readinessHint');
    if (!scoreEl || !hintEl) return;
    const mood    = state._preMood;
    const tension = state._preTension;
    const energy  = state._preEnergy;
    // If mood hasn't been set yet (no emoji clicked), surface placeholder
    if (mood == null && tension == null && energy == null) {
      scoreEl.textContent = '—';
      hintEl.textContent = 'set mood, tension, and energy above for a guidance hint';
      return;
    }
    const m = Number.isFinite(mood)    ? mood    : 5;
    const t = Number.isFinite(tension) ? tension : 5;
    const e = Number.isFinite(energy)  ? energy  : 5;
    // Weighted blend. Mood/energy add to a baseline; tension subtracts.
    // Centered so a neutral 5/5/5 reads ~5.0; weights tuned so a clearly
    // depleted user (mood 2, tension 8, energy 2) lands around 1-2.
    const raw = 5 + 0.4 * (m - 5) + 0.4 * (e - 5) - 0.4 * (t - 5);
    const score = Math.max(0, Math.min(10, raw));
    scoreEl.textContent = score.toFixed(1) + '/10';
    let hint;
    if (score < 3.5)  hint = 'depleted — consider a short, grounding session. Sleep, breath, or settling will land better than work.';
    else if (score < 5) hint = 'low resources — light depth + short length recommended.';
    else if (score < 7) hint = 'balanced — most session shapes will work well today.';
    else                hint = 'resourced — a deeper or longer session is likely to integrate well.';
    hintEl.textContent = hint;
  }

  // Post-session mood slider (0-10)

  /** Persist post-session check-in values to history[0] + analytics + adaptive
   *  reward correction. Debounced to avoid amplifying per-day metric samples
   *  on every slider drag step. Single point so all three sliders use the
   *  same persistence path — previously only the mood slider wrote anything,
   *  so depth/alertness data was discarded silently. */
  let _postCheckinPersistTimer = null;
  function persistPostCheckin() {
    clearTimeout(_postCheckinPersistTimer);
    _postCheckinPersistTimer = setTimeout(async () => {
      _postCheckinPersistTimer = null;
      try {
        const moodVal  = parseInt($('postStateSlider')?.value ?? 5, 10);
        const depthVal = parseInt($('depthSlider')?.value ?? 5, 10);
        const alertVal = parseInt($('alertnessSlider')?.value ?? 7, 10);
        const history = (await idbGet('stillness_history_v1')) || [];
        if (history.length > 0) {
          history[0].postMood   = moodVal;
          history[0].preMood    = state._preMood ?? null;
          history[0].preTension = state._preTension ?? null;
          history[0].preEnergy  = state._preEnergy ?? null;
          history[0].depth      = depthVal;
          history[0].alertness  = alertVal;
          await idbSet('stillness_history_v1', history);
        }
        recordPostMood(moodVal);
        // Patch today's metrics-history aggregate with the post-checkin signals.
        updateMetricsHistoryWithPostCheckin({
          postMood: moodVal,
          preMood:  state._preMood ?? null,
          depth:    depthVal,
          alertness: alertVal,
        }).catch(err => console.warn('[metrics] post-checkin patch failed:', err));
        // Retroactively correct adaptive reward now that real postMood is known
        try {
          const adaptive = await getAdaptive();
          const h = (await idbGet('stillness_history_v1')) || [];
          if (h.length > 0 && adaptive.ts > 0) {
            const rec = h[0];
            const oldReward = ((5) - (rec.preMood ?? 5)) + (rec.completed ? 1 : -1);
            const newReward = (moodVal - (rec.preMood ?? 5)) + (rec.completed ? 1 : -1);
            const correction = newReward - oldReward;
            if (Math.abs(correction) > 0.01) {
              const bump = (map, key) => { if (key) map[key] = (map[key] || 0) + correction; };
              bump(adaptive.w.p, rec.personaId); bump(adaptive.w.m, rec.methodId);
              bump(adaptive.w.s, rec.soundscape); bump(adaptive.w.ln, rec.length);
              await idbSet(ADAPTIVE_KEY, adaptive);
            }
          }
        } catch {}
      } catch (err) { console.warn('[postCheckin] persistence failed:', err); }
    }, 600);
  }

  $('postStateSlider')?.addEventListener('input', e => {
    const val = parseInt(e.target.value, 10);
    const el = $('postStateVal'); if (el) el.textContent = e.target.value;
    const fb = $('moodFeedback');
    const delta = val - (state._preMood ?? 5);
    if (fb) fb.textContent = delta > 0 ? `+${delta} improvement` : delta === 0 ? 'same as before' : `${delta} — be gentle with yourself`;
    persistPostCheckin();
  });

  // Depth slider — was previously not persisted independently. The mood
  // slider's debounced save would scoop up the depth value from the DOM,
  // but only if the user happened to also touch mood. Now writes via the
  // shared helper.
  $('depthSlider')?.addEventListener('input', e => {
    const el = $('depthVal'); if (el) el.textContent = e.target.value;
    persistPostCheckin();
  });

  // Alertness check — auto-trigger grounding if low. Also persists to
  // history[0].alertness via the shared helper (was previously collected
  // but never written to disk).
  $('alertnessSlider')?.addEventListener('input', e => {
    const val = parseInt(e.target.value, 10);
    const el = $('alertnessVal'); if (el) el.textContent = e.target.value;
    // Howard Alertness Scale: if alertness < 5, show grounding exercise.
    // moodFeedback is shared with the mood-delta message, so we only set
    // the drowsy text on the way down and clear it (or restore the mood
    // delta) on the way up — otherwise the stale "drowsy" warning lingers.
    const groundingBox = $('groundingBox');
    const fb = $('moodFeedback');
    if (groundingBox) {
      if (val < 5) {
        groundingBox.style.display = 'block';
        if (fb) fb.textContent = 'You seem drowsy — please do the grounding exercise before standing up.';
      } else {
        groundingBox.style.display = 'none';
        // Restore the mood-delta message (or clear if no shift) so the
        // drowsy warning doesn't persist after alertness recovers.
        if (fb) {
          const moodVal = parseInt($('postStateSlider')?.value ?? 5, 10);
          const delta = moodVal - (state._preMood ?? 5);
          fb.textContent = delta > 0 ? `+${delta} improvement` : delta === 0 ? '' : `${delta} — be gentle with yourself`;
        }
      }
    }
    persistPostCheckin();
  });

  // ── Post-session conversational check-in handlers ──────────────────
  // Mirrors the pre-session toggle/apply pair above. The journal mic on
  // the journalText textarea is unrelated — that's freeform reflection
  // saved verbatim, not check-in input.
  $('postCheckinTextToggle')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
    const wrap = $('postCheckinTextWrap');
    const tog  = $('postCheckinTextToggle');
    if (!wrap || !tog) return;
    const showing = wrap.style.display !== 'none';
    wrap.style.display = showing ? 'none' : '';
    tog.textContent = showing ? 'type it instead' : 'use sliders instead';
    if (!showing) $('postCheckinText')?.focus();
  });

  $('postCheckinTextApply')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
    const text = $('postCheckinText')?.value || '';
    const parsed = parsePostCheckinText(text);
    const applied = [];
    if (parsed.mood != null) {
      const el = $('postStateSlider'); if (el) el.value = String(parsed.mood);
      const ev = $('postStateVal'); if (ev) ev.textContent = String(parsed.mood);
      applied.push(`mood ${parsed.mood}/10`);
    }
    if (parsed.alertness != null) {
      const el = $('alertnessSlider'); if (el) el.value = String(parsed.alertness);
      const ev = $('alertnessVal'); if (ev) ev.textContent = String(parsed.alertness);
      applied.push(`alertness ${parsed.alertness}/10`);
    }
    if (parsed.depth != null) {
      const el = $('depthSlider'); if (el) el.value = String(parsed.depth);
      const ev = $('depthVal'); if (ev) ev.textContent = String(parsed.depth);
      applied.push(`depth ${parsed.depth}/10`);
    }
    const hint = $('postCheckinTextHint');
    if (hint) {
      if (applied.length) {
        hint.textContent = `parsed → ${applied.join(' · ')}. Adjust the sliders if anything feels off.`;
        hint.style.color = 'var(--text-dim)';
      } else {
        hint.textContent = 'no clear mood/alertness/depth signals found — try mentioning how you feel, how alert you are, and how deep it went.';
        hint.style.color = 'var(--neon-amber)';
      }
    }
    // Trigger the existing slider input handlers so feedback text +
    // grounding box + persistPostCheckin all run through the canonical
    // path (no duplication of the mood-delta or drowsy logic here).
    if (parsed.mood != null) $('postStateSlider')?.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true }));
    if (parsed.alertness != null) $('alertnessSlider')?.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true }));
    if (parsed.depth != null) $('depthSlider')?.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true }));
  });

  // Journal save + tier-aware sentiment classification. The basic save runs
  // on every blur. Sentiment is a paid-tier-only enhancement: when user is
  // on Anthropic/OpenAI, a small classification call runs once per journal
  // entry and feeds the adaptive system a richer post-session quality
  // signal than just mood-delta. Perchance tier skips this — keeps quotas
  // available for the actual script generation.
  $('journalText')?.addEventListener('blur', async () => {
    const text = $('journalText')?.value?.trim();
    if (!text) return;
    const history = (await idbGet('stillness_history_v1')) || [];
    if (history.length === 0) return;
    history[0].journal = text;
    await idbSet('stillness_history_v1', history);
    // Sentiment pass — gated on tier + entry length. Short entries
    // ("good", "fine") don't reward the round-trip; long ones do.
    const tier = (typeof getAITier === 'function') ? getAITier() : 'perchance';
    if ((tier === 'anthropic' || tier === 'openai') && text.length >= 25) {
      // Skip if this entry has already been classified.
      if (history[0].journalSentiment && history[0].journalSentimentText === text) return;
      try {
        const data = await aiGenerate(
          `Classify the emotional tone of this hypnosis-session journal entry. Respond with ONLY a single JSON object, no preamble: {"valence":-1.0..1.0,"intensity":0.0..1.0,"integration":"weak"|"moderate"|"strong"}. valence: negative→positive feeling. intensity: how strongly felt. integration: how well the user describes embodying the work in language.\n\nEntry: ${text}\n\nJSON:`,
          { source: 'journal-sentiment', maxTokens: 80, stopSequences: ['\n\n'] }
        );
        if (!data || data.stopReason === 'error') return;
        const raw = (data.generatedText || '').trim();
        const s = raw.indexOf('{'), e = raw.lastIndexOf('}');
        if (s < 0 || e <= s) return;
        const parsed = JSON.parse(raw.slice(s, e + 1));
        const sentiment = {
          valence:    Math.max(-1, Math.min(1, Number(parsed.valence) || 0)),
          intensity:  Math.max(0, Math.min(1, Number(parsed.intensity) || 0)),
          integration: ['weak', 'moderate', 'strong'].includes(parsed.integration) ? parsed.integration : 'moderate',
          ts: Date.now(),
        };
        // Re-fetch history in case it changed since blur.
        const fresh = (await idbGet('stillness_history_v1')) || [];
        if (fresh.length && fresh[0].journal === text) {
          fresh[0].journalSentiment = sentiment;
          fresh[0].journalSentimentText = text;
          await idbSet('stillness_history_v1', fresh);
          sdLog('journal sentiment captured', sentiment);
        }
      } catch (err) { console.warn('[journal-sentiment] failed:', err); }
    }
  });

  // Voice journaling — webkitSpeechRecognition (Chrome/Edge). Reveal the
  // mic button only if the API exists; Firefox + iOS Safari don't and
  // showing a button that doesn't work is worse than no button.
  (function _setupVoiceJournal() {
    const SR = window.SpeechRecognition || window.webkitSpeechRecognition;
    const btn = $('journalMicBtn');
    if (!SR || !btn) return;
    btn.style.display = '';
    let recognizer = null;
    let recording = false;
    btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
      const ta = $('journalText');
      if (!ta) return;
      if (recording) {
        try { recognizer?.stop(); } catch {}
        return;
      }
      try {
        recognizer = new SR();
        recognizer.lang = (navigator.language || 'en-US');
        recognizer.continuous = true;
        recognizer.interimResults = false;
        recognizer.onresult = (ev) => {
          // Append each finalized result to the textarea, separated by a
          // single space so consecutive recognitions read as continuous prose.
          for (let i = ev.resultIndex; i < ev.results.length; i++) {
            const res = ev.results[i];
            if (res.isFinal && res[0]?.transcript) {
              const sep = ta.value && !ta.value.endsWith(' ') ? ' ' : '';
              ta.value = ta.value + sep + res[0].transcript.trim();
            }
          }
        };
        recognizer.onerror = (ev) => {
          if (ev.error === 'not-allowed' || ev.error === 'service-not-allowed') {
            notify.warn('Microphone permission denied — voice journaling unavailable.');
          } else if (ev.error !== 'no-speech' && ev.error !== 'aborted') {
            console.warn('[voice-journal] recognition error:', ev.error);
          }
        };
        recognizer.onend = () => {
          recording = false;
          btn.textContent = '🎤 speak';
          btn.style.color = '';
          btn.style.borderColor = '';
        };
        recognizer.start();
        recording = true;
        btn.textContent = '⏹ stop';
        btn.style.color = 'var(--neon-amber)';
        btn.style.borderColor = 'var(--neon-amber)';
      } catch (e) {
        console.warn('[voice-journal] start failed:', e);
        notify.warn('Could not start voice input — try typing instead.');
        recording = false;
        btn.textContent = '🎤 speak';
      }
    });
  })();

  // Backup/restore
  $('backupBtn')?.addEventListener('click', exportBackup);
  $('restoreInput')?.addEventListener('change', e => {
    const file = e.target.files?.[0];
    if (file) importBackup(file);
    e.target.value = ''; // Reset so same file can be re-imported
  });

  // Stats charts modal
  $('openStatsBtn')?.addEventListener('click', openStatsModal);
  $('statsModalClose')?.addEventListener('click', closeStatsModal);
  $('statsModal')?.addEventListener('click', e => { if (e.target.id === 'statsModal') closeStatsModal(); });
  document.querySelectorAll('.stats-tile').forEach(tile => {
    tile.addEventListener('click', () => toggleStatsTile(tile));
  });

  // Annual review — opt-in modal showing year-shape from history. Button
  // only reveals when there's enough history to be worth reviewing
  // (≥30 days since the oldest session). Pure aggregation over IDB,
  // no AI calls, no notifies.
  async function _showAnnualReviewBtnIfReady() {
    try {
      const btn = $('openAnnualReviewBtn');
      if (!btn) return;
      const history = (await idbGet('stillness_history_v1')) || [];
      if (!history.length) { btn.style.display = 'none'; return; }
      const oldest = history[history.length - 1];
      const daysSpan = (Date.now() - oldest.date) / 86400000;
      btn.style.display = (daysSpan >= 30 && history.length >= 5) ? '' : 'none';
    } catch { /* leave hidden */ }
  }
  _showAnnualReviewBtnIfReady();
  $('openAnnualReviewBtn')?.addEventListener('click', async () => {
    try {
      const history = (await idbGet('stillness_history_v1')) || [];
      const analytics = await getAnalytics();
      if (!history.length) {
        alertModal('Annual review', 'No sessions on record yet. Come back after a few weeks of practice.');
        return;
      }
      // Year window — the trailing 365 days from now.
      const now = Date.now();
      const yearAgo = now - 365 * 86400000;
      const inWindow = history.filter(r => r.date >= yearAgo);
      const days = Math.min(365, Math.ceil((now - history[history.length - 1].date) / 86400000));
      const completed = inWindow.filter(r => r.completed).length;
      const completionPct = inWindow.length ? Math.round(completed / inWindow.length * 100) : 0;
      const minutes = Math.round(inWindow.reduce((s, r) => s + (r.durationSec || 0), 0) / 60);
      // Top picks
      const personaCount = {}, methodCount = {}, tagCount = {};
      for (const r of inWindow) {
        if (r.guide)  personaCount[r.guide]  = (personaCount[r.guide]  || 0) + 1;
        if (r.method) methodCount[r.method]  = (methodCount[r.method]  || 0) + 1;
        for (const t of (r.sessionTags || [])) tagCount[t] = (tagCount[t] || 0) + 1;
      }
      const topN = (map, n) => Object.entries(map).sort((a,b) => b[1]-a[1]).slice(0, n);
      const topPersonas = topN(personaCount, 3);
      const topMethods  = topN(methodCount, 3);
      const topTags     = topN(tagCount, 5);
      // Mood arc
      const withMood = inWindow.filter(r => r.preMood != null && r.postMood != null);
      const avgPre  = withMood.length ? (withMood.reduce((s,r) => s + r.preMood, 0)  / withMood.length) : null;
      const avgPost = withMood.length ? (withMood.reduce((s,r) => s + r.postMood, 0) / withMood.length) : null;
      const avgDelta = (avgPre != null && avgPost != null) ? (avgPost - avgPre) : null;
      // Longest streak — walk history (already sorted newest-first)
      // counting consecutive days. Two-day grace gap allowed for one
      // missed day, matching the sidebar streak behavior.
      let longest = 0, current = 0, lastDay = null;
      const sortedByDate = [...inWindow].sort((a,b) => a.date - b.date);
      for (const r of sortedByDate) {
        const day = new Date(r.date); day.setHours(0,0,0,0);
        const dayMs = day.getTime();
        if (lastDay == null) { current = 1; }
        else {
          const gap = (dayMs - lastDay) / 86400000;
          if (gap === 0) { /* same day, no change */ }
          else if (gap === 1) { current++; }
          else if (gap === 2) { current++; /* one-day grace */ }
          else { current = 1; }
        }
        if (current > longest) longest = current;
        lastDay = dayMs;
      }
      const fmt = (arr) => arr.map(([k,v]) => `${k} (${v})`).join(', ');
      const lines = [
        `Window: trailing ${days < 365 ? `${days} days` : 'year'}`,
        `Sessions: ${inWindow.length} · ${minutes} minutes total`,
        `Completion rate: ${completionPct}%`,
        `Longest streak: ${longest} day${longest === 1 ? '' : 's'}`,
        avgDelta != null
          ? `Average mood arc: ${avgPre.toFixed(1)} → ${avgPost.toFixed(1)} (Δ ${avgDelta >= 0 ? '+' : ''}${avgDelta.toFixed(1)})`
          : `Mood data: not enough check-ins for an average`,
        topPersonas.length ? `Most-used guides: ${fmt(topPersonas)}` : '',
        topMethods.length  ? `Most-used methods: ${fmt(topMethods)}`  : '',
        topTags.length     ? `Most-tagged contexts: ${fmt(topTags)}`  : '',
      ].filter(Boolean);
      alertModal('Annual review', lines.join('\n\n'));
    } catch (err) {
      console.warn('[annual-review] failed:', err);
      alertModal('Annual review', 'Could not generate the review — try again later.');
    }
  });

  // Config presets
  $('presetSaveBtn')?.addEventListener('click', async () => {
    const suggested = `${(getPersona().name || 'session').toLowerCase()} · ${state.length}`;
    const name = await promptAsync(
      'Name this preset. It captures length, voice, soundscape, visualizer, and audio-reactive settings — but not your persona or method choice.',
      { title: 'save preset', placeholder: 'e.g. evening sleep, deep focus', initial: suggested, okText: 'save', maxLength: 60 }
    );
    if (!name) return;
    const existing = await listConfigPresets();
    if (existing.some(p => p.name === name)) {
      const overwrite = await confirmAsync(`A preset named "${name}" already exists. Overwrite?`, { okText: 'overwrite', cancelText: 'cancel' });
      if (!overwrite) return;
    }
    await saveConfigPreset(name, getCurrentConfigSnapshot());
    await renderPresetDropdown();
    await _onPresetsChanged();
    const sel = $('presetSelect'); if (sel) sel.value = name;
    notify.success(`Preset "${name}" saved.`);
  });
  $('presetLoadBtn')?.addEventListener('click', async () => {
    const name = $('presetSelect')?.value;
    if (!name) { notify.info('Choose a preset to load first.'); return; }
    const list = await listConfigPresets();
    const preset = list.find(p => p.name === name);
    if (!preset) { notify.warn('Preset not found.'); await renderPresetDropdown(); return; }
    applyConfigSnapshot(preset.snapshot);
    notify.success(`Loaded "${name}".`);
  });
  $('presetDeleteBtn')?.addEventListener('click', async () => {
    const name = $('presetSelect')?.value;
    if (!name) { notify.info('Choose a preset to delete first.'); return; }
    const ok = await confirmAsync(`Delete preset "${name}"? This cannot be undone.`, { okText: 'delete', cancelText: 'keep' });
    if (!ok) return;
    await deleteConfigPreset(name);
    await renderPresetDropdown();
    await _onPresetsChanged();
    notify.success(`Preset "${name}" deleted.`);
  });

  // ── A/B comparison mode ─────────────────────────────────────────────
  // Reveal toggle for the A/B bar. Hidden by default to keep the preset
  // section uncluttered. Once revealed, the bar persists across sessions
  // (state.abModeRevealed) so users who use it don't have to re-open.
  function _refreshAbBarVisibility() {
    const bar = $('abBar');
    const toggle = $('abModeToggle');
    if (!bar || !toggle) return;
    const on = !!state.abModeRevealed;
    bar.style.display = on ? 'flex' : 'none';
    toggle.textContent = on ? '× hide A/B compare' : '+ A/B compare mode';
  }
  $('abModeToggle')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
    state.abModeRevealed = !state.abModeRevealed;
    saveUserSettings();
    _refreshAbBarVisibility();
    if (state.abModeRevealed) _refreshAbPresetDropdowns();
  });

  /** Mirror the preset list into both A and B dropdowns. */
  async function _refreshAbPresetDropdowns() {
    const list = await listConfigPresets();
    const opts = '<option value="">— pick —</option>'
      + list.map(p => `<option value="${escapeHtml(p.name)}">${escapeHtml(p.name)}</option>`).join('');
    const a = $('abPresetA');
    const b = $('abPresetB');
    if (a) { const prev = a.value; a.innerHTML = opts; if (list.some(p => p.name === prev)) a.value = prev; }
    if (b) { const prev = b.value; b.innerHTML = opts; if (list.some(p => p.name === prev)) b.value = prev; }
  }

  // Refresh dropdowns when presets change. Called from preset save/delete
  // handlers below — replaces a fragile function-rebinding wrapper.
  async function _onPresetsChanged() {
    if (state.abModeRevealed) await _refreshAbPresetDropdowns();
  }

  $('abRunBtn')?.addEventListener('click', async () => {
    const aName = $('abPresetA')?.value;
    const bName = $('abPresetB')?.value;
    if (!aName || !bName) { notify.info('Pick a preset for both A and B first.'); return; }
    if (aName === bName) { notify.warn('A and B are the same preset — pick two different ones.'); return; }
    const list = await listConfigPresets();
    const preset = list.find(p => p.name === (Math.random() < 0.5 ? aName : bName));
    if (!preset) { notify.warn('One of the presets is missing — refresh and try again.'); return; }
    // Stash the chosen side WITHOUT revealing in the UI. The post-session
    // rating widget will read this and unblind on rating submission.
    state._abActivePreset = preset.name;
    state._abPair = { a: aName, b: bName };
    applyConfigSnapshot(preset.snapshot);
    const last = $('abLastResult');
    if (last) last.textContent = `🎲 Blinded run loaded. The chosen side will be revealed after you rate the session.`;
    notify.success('Random preset applied. Generate and run as usual.');
  });

  $('abStatsBtn')?.addEventListener('click', async () => {
    const results = (await idbGet('stillness_ab_results_v1')) || {};
    const list = await listConfigPresets();
    const lines = list
      .map(p => {
        const r = results[p.name];
        if (!r || !r.ratings?.length) return null;
        const avg = (r.ratings.reduce((s,v) => s+v, 0) / r.ratings.length).toFixed(2);
        return `${p.name} — avg ${avg} / 5  · n=${r.ratings.length}`;
      })
      .filter(Boolean);
    if (!lines.length) {
      alertModal('A/B results', 'No ratings yet. Run a blinded session and submit a rating to start tracking.');
      return;
    }
    alertModal('A/B results', lines.join('\n'));
  });

  _refreshAbBarVisibility();
  if (state.abModeRevealed) _refreshAbPresetDropdowns();

  // Post-session rating buttons for A/B blinded runs.
  document.querySelectorAll('#postAbRatingButtons button').forEach(btn => {
    btn.addEventListener('click', async () => {
      const rating = parseInt(btn.dataset.rating, 10);
      if (!Number.isFinite(rating) || rating < 1 || rating > 5) return;
      const presetName = state._abActivePreset;
      const pair = state._abPair || {};
      if (!presetName) return; // shouldn't fire without an active preset
      try {
        const all = (await idbGet('stillness_ab_results_v1')) || {};
        const slot = all[presetName] || { ratings: [], firstAt: Date.now() };
        slot.ratings.push(rating);
        slot.lastAt = Date.now();
        // Cap at 100 ratings per preset to keep storage bounded.
        if (slot.ratings.length > 100) slot.ratings = slot.ratings.slice(-100);
        all[presetName] = slot;
        await idbSet('stillness_ab_results_v1', all);
      } catch (e) { console.warn('[ab] save failed:', e); }
      // Disable buttons + show reveal
      document.querySelectorAll('#postAbRatingButtons button').forEach(b => b.disabled = true);
      btn.style.outline = '2px solid var(--neon-cyan)';
      const reveal = $('postAbReveal');
      if (reveal) {
        const isA = pair.a === presetName;
        const otherSide = isA ? pair.b : pair.a;
        reveal.innerHTML = `Rated <strong>${rating}/5</strong>. You ran preset <strong>${escapeHtml(presetName)}</strong> ${isA ? '(side A)' : '(side B)'}. ${otherSide ? `The other side was <em>${escapeHtml(otherSide)}</em>. Try the same A/B comparison again to build up the sample.` : ''}`;
      }
      state._abActivePreset = null;
      state._abPair = null;
    });
  });

  // Session
  $('pauseBtn').addEventListener('click', togglePause);
  $('endBtn').addEventListener('click', emergencyEnd);
  $('spContinueBtn')?.addEventListener('click', closeSoftPauseAndContinue);
  $('spEndBtn')?.addEventListener('click', closeSoftPauseAndEnd);
  // Interactive 5-4-3-2-1 grounding — tap each step as you find the items
  document.querySelectorAll('#groundingBox .grounding-step.interactive').forEach(step => {
    step.addEventListener('click', () => step.classList.toggle('done'));
  });
  $('backToEditBtn').addEventListener('click', async () => {
    if (!await confirmAsync('Stop the session and return to the script editor?')) return;
    state.abortFlag = true;
    state._finishing = true;            // prevent playback loop from calling finishSession
    state.paused = false;               // don't inherit paused state into next session
    clearInterval(state._timeInterval); // stop elapsed timer
    clearTimeout(state._safetyTimeout); // prevent ghost post-screen switch
    state._sessionStartTime = null;
    // Mirror the cleanup finishSession does for cross-session state — without
    // these resets a duck rule that was mid-cycle at click-time leaks its
    // pre-duck snapshot and engagement EMA into the next session.
    state._rulesPreDuckVolume = null;
    if (typeof resetStateEngine === 'function') resetStateEngine();
    if (typeof clearRuntimeRuleState === 'function') clearRuntimeRuleState();
    if (typeof clearTriggerWindowState === 'function') clearTriggerWindowState();
    if (typeof stopAudioReactiveLoop === 'function') stopAudioReactiveLoop();
    speechSynthesis.cancel();
    if (state.useLocalTTS && _localTTS.ready) _localTTS.cancel();
    drone.stop(); stopVisuals();
    setSleepOverlay(false);
    bgEngine.clear();
    stopRecording();
    closeLivePanel();
    // Clear lock-screen media session
    setMediaSession(false);
    try { state._wakeLock?.release(); } catch(e) {}
    document.body.classList.remove('in-session'); document.body.classList.remove('controls-hidden'); clearTimeout(_controlsTimer);
    switchScreen('setup-wizard');
    goToStep(6); // Step 6 is Generate (holds scriptText); Step 5 is Configure
    notify.info('Session stopped. You can edit the script and restart.');
  });
  /** Flush the journal text to history[0] synchronously-as-possible before
   *  navigating away from the post-session screen. The journal's blur
   *  handler is the primary save path, but a click-on-button event can
   *  fire before/concurrent with blur on some browsers — and if a user
   *  closes the tab directly the blur never fires. This is the safety net. */
  async function flushJournalSave() {
    const text = $('journalText')?.value?.trim();
    if (!text) return;
    try {
      const history = (await idbGet('stillness_history_v1')) || [];
      if (history.length > 0) { history[0].journal = text; await idbSet('stillness_history_v1', history); }
    } catch (e) { console.warn('[journal] flush failed:', e); }
  }

  $('restartBtn')?.addEventListener('click', async () => {
    await flushJournalSave();
    resetWizardForNewSession({ preserveSelections: true });
  });
  $('returnToSetupBtn')?.addEventListener('click', async () => {
    await flushJournalSave();
    switchScreen('setup-wizard');
    goToStep(1);
  });
  $('postBackToScriptBtn')?.addEventListener('click', async () => {
    await flushJournalSave();
    switchScreen('setup-wizard');
    goToStep(6); // Step 6 is Generate (holds scriptText); Step 5 is Configure
  });

  // Trigger-fired button — delegated on the post-screen container since the
  // button is rendered dynamically. Records the fire to IDB and updates the
  // button label in place. Idempotent within an hour so accidental double-
  // clicks don't inflate the fire count.
  document.getElementById('post-screen')?.addEventListener('click', async e => {
    const btn = e.target.closest?.('#triggerFiredBtn');
    if (!btn) return;
    const trigger = btn.dataset.trigger;
    if (!trigger) return;
    try {
      const all = (await idbGet(TRIGGER_FIRES_KEY)) || {};
      const slot = all[trigger] || { firedDates: [], totalFires: 0, lastUpdate: 0 };
      const nowIso = new Date().toISOString();
      const lastFireMs = slot.firedDates.length ? new Date(slot.firedDates[0]).getTime() : 0;
      // Debounce: ignore if last fire was within the last hour.
      if (Date.now() - lastFireMs < 3600 * 1000) {
        notify.info('Already logged in the last hour.');
        return;
      }
      slot.firedDates.unshift(nowIso);
      if (slot.firedDates.length > 100) slot.firedDates.length = 100;
      slot.totalFires = (slot.totalFires || 0) + 1;
      slot.lastUpdate = Date.now();
      all[trigger] = slot;
      await idbSet(TRIGGER_FIRES_KEY, all);
      btn.textContent = `✓ fired today (${slot.totalFires} total)`;
      btn.disabled = true;
      setTimeout(() => { btn.disabled = false; }, 3600 * 1000);
      notify.success('Trigger fire logged. The Director will reinforce this in future sessions.');
    } catch (err) {
      console.warn('[trigger-fire] log failed:', err);
      notify.warn('Could not save trigger fire — try again.');
    }
  });
  $('transcriptToggle')?.addEventListener('click', toggleTranscript);
  $('recordBtn')?.addEventListener('click', toggleRecording);
  $('fullscreenBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
    const stage = $('stage');
    if (!stage) return;
    if (document.fullscreenElement) {
      document.exitFullscreen().catch(() => {});
    } else {
      // Try standard first, fall back to webkit. Each returns a promise that can reject
      // (user denied, iframe blocked, etc.) — swallow to avoid uncaught-rejection warnings.
      const req = stage.requestFullscreen?.() ?? stage.webkitRequestFullscreen?.();
      if (req && typeof req.catch === 'function') req.catch(() => {});
    }
  });
  document.addEventListener('fullscreenchange', () => {
    const btn = $('fullscreenBtn');
    if (btn) btn.textContent = document.fullscreenElement ? '⛶ exit' : '⛶ fullscreen';
  });

  // ── Live Settings Panel ────────────────────────────────────────────
  function openLivePanel() {
    const panel = $('livePanel');
    const overlay = $('livePanelOverlay');
    if (!panel) return;
    // Sync controls to current state before opening
    const $v = (id, val) => { const el = $(id); if (el) el.value = val; };
    $v('liveVizSelect', state.vizOverride === 'auto' ? (getMethod().visual) : state.vizOverride);
    $v('liveSoundscapeSelect', state.soundscape);
    $v('liveSoundVol', Math.round(state.droneVolume * 100));
    $v('liveVoiceSpeed', Math.round(state.speechRate * 100));
    $v('liveVoicePitch', Math.round((state.voicePitch || 0.85) * 100));
    $v('liveVoiceVol', Math.round((state.voiceVolume ?? 1) * 100));
    $('liveSoundVolVal').textContent = Math.round(state.droneVolume * 100);
    $('liveVoiceSpeedVal').textContent = state.speechRate.toFixed(2) + '×';
    $('liveVoicePitchVal').textContent = (state.voicePitch || 0.85).toFixed(2);
    $('liveVoiceVolVal').textContent = Math.round((state.voiceVolume ?? 1) * 100);
    $v('liveTempo', Math.round((state.tempoMultiplier || 1) * 100));
    $('liveTempoVal').textContent = (state.tempoMultiplier || 1).toFixed(1) + '×';
    // Sync HUD toggles
    const hudMap = { liveFixDot:'fixationDot', liveText:'textDisplay', livePhaseDots:'phaseDots', livePhaseLabel:'phaseLabel', liveProgress:'progressBar', liveTime:'sessionTime', liveLabels:'labels' };
    for (const [elId, key] of Object.entries(hudMap)) {
      const el = $(elId); if (el) el.checked = state.hud[key] !== false;
    }
    // Sync background controls
    const bgSection = $('liveBgSection');
    if (bgSection) bgSection.style.display = bgEngine.source !== 'none' ? '' : 'none';
    const bgToggle = $('liveBgToggle'); if (bgToggle) bgToggle.checked = $('bgLayer')?.style.display !== 'none';
    // Bg opacity — read from state every open so the slider reflects the truth
    // even if the user changed it via Step-5 since the last open.
    const bgOpacityPct = Math.round((state.bgImageOpacity ?? 0.35) * 100);
    $v('liveBgOpacity', bgOpacityPct);
    const bgOpacityValEl = $('liveBgOpacityVal'); if (bgOpacityValEl) bgOpacityValEl.textContent = bgOpacityPct + '%';
    // Bg rotation (hold time between slides) — 10–120 seconds, integer
    const bgRotSec = Math.max(10, Math.min(120, Math.round(Number(state.bgRotationSec) || 45)));
    $v('liveBgRotation', bgRotSec);
    const bgRotValEl = $('liveBgRotationVal'); if (bgRotValEl) bgRotValEl.textContent = bgRotSec + 's';
    // Bg transition fade — slider is in 0.1s steps (1–60), seconds = val/10
    const bgTransSec = Math.max(0.1, Math.min(6, Number(state.bgTransitionDuration) || 3));
    const bgTransSlider = Math.round(bgTransSec * 10);
    $v('liveBgTransition', bgTransSlider);
    const bgTransValEl = $('liveBgTransitionVal'); if (bgTransValEl) bgTransValEl.textContent = bgTransSec.toFixed(1) + 's';
    panel.classList.add('open');
    if (overlay) overlay.classList.add('open');
  }
  function closeLivePanel() {
    $('livePanel')?.classList.remove('open');
    $('livePanelOverlay')?.classList.remove('open');
  }

  $('liveSettingsBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
    const panel = $('livePanel');
    if (panel?.classList.contains('open')) closeLivePanel(); else openLivePanel();
  });
  $('livePanelClose')?.addEventListener('click', closeLivePanel);
  $('livePanelOverlay')?.addEventListener('click', closeLivePanel);

  // Live visual switch — tear down and rebuild mid-session
  $('liveVizSelect')?.addEventListener('change', e => {
    const viz = e.target.value;
    state.vizOverride = viz;
    if (viz === 'none') {
      stopVisuals();
      const stage = $('stage');
      Array.from(stage.children).forEach(c => {
        if (!c.classList.contains('fixation-dot') && !c.classList.contains('audio-indicator')
          && !c.classList.contains('persona-indicator') && !c.classList.contains('method-indicator')
          && !c.classList.contains('session-progress-wrap') && !c.classList.contains('transcript-panel')) c.remove();
      });
    } else if (viz === 'pulse' || viz === 'spiral') {
      stopVisuals(); setupVisual(viz);
    } else {
      stopVisuals(); setupVisual(viz);
    }
  });

  // Live audio-reactive toggle — mirrors the Step 5 control.
  // setAudioReactiveMode() handles syncing both UIs via [data-audio-mode].
  $('liveAudioReactiveSeg')?.addEventListener('click', e => {
    const btn = e.target.closest('button[data-audio-mode]');
    if (!btn) return;
    setAudioReactiveMode(btn.dataset.audioMode);
    saveUserSettings();
  });

  // Live soundscape switch — stop and restart with new type
  // Sequencing token for live soundscape changes — drone.stop()/start() each
  // take >2s, so without this a rapid second click would queue a full second
  // teardown/start cycle on top of the first, briefly playing the
  // intermediate type. The token lets the older handler bail after its
  // awaits resolve if a newer change has superseded it.
  let _liveSoundscapeToken = 0;
  $('liveSoundscapeSelect')?.addEventListener('change', async e => {
    const myToken = ++_liveSoundscapeToken;
    const type = e.target.value;
    state.soundscape = type;
    state.droneEnabled = type !== 'none';
    state._soundscapeOverridden = true;
    // Sync the Configure-step select so the two stay aligned
    const ssSelect = $('soundscapeSelect'); if (ssSelect) ssSelect.value = type;
    saveUserSettings();
    await drone.stop();
    if (myToken !== _liveSoundscapeToken) return; // superseded — don't start the now-stale type
    if (type !== 'none') {
      await drone.start(state.droneVolume, type);
      if (myToken !== _liveSoundscapeToken) return; // superseded during start; let the newer handler take over
      // Re-apply the current phase's frequency to the newly-started
      // engine so phase-locked binaural / isochronic / drone catches
      // up to the live session position. Without this they sit at
      // their initial defaults until the next phase boundary.
      if (state._currentPhase) {
        try { drone.setPhaseFreq(state._currentPhase); } catch {}
      }
      const ai = $('audioIndicator');
      if (ai) ai.textContent = '· ' + type + ' ·';
    } else {
      const ai = $('audioIndicator');
      if (ai) ai.textContent = '';
    }
  });

  // Live audio sliders
  $('liveSoundVol')?.addEventListener('input', e => {
    state.droneVolume = parseInt(e.target.value,10)/100; drone.setVolume(state.droneVolume);
    $('liveSoundVolVal').textContent = e.target.value;
  });
  $('liveVoiceSpeed')?.addEventListener('input', e => {
    const rate = parseInt(e.target.value,10)/100;
    state.speechRate = rate;
    $('liveVoiceSpeedVal').textContent = rate.toFixed(2) + '×';
    // Local-TTS path: AudioBufferSourceNode.playbackRate is a live AudioParam,
    // so we can update the in-flight buffer's rate immediately. The system
    // path can't (SpeechSynthesisUtterance.rate is read-once at speak time),
    // so the change there only takes effect on the next sentence.
    if (state.useLocalTTS && _localTTS.currentSource) {
      try { _localTTS.currentSource.playbackRate.value = Math.max(0.5, Math.min(2, rate)); } catch {}
    }
  });
  $('liveVoicePitch')?.addEventListener('input', e => {
    state.voicePitch = parseInt(e.target.value,10)/100;
    $('liveVoicePitchVal').textContent = (parseInt(e.target.value,10)/100).toFixed(2);
    // No live-pitch hook: local TTS doesn't expose a pitch shifter, system
    // TTS reads pitch at speak time. Both paths apply on next sentence.
  });
  $('liveVoiceVol')?.addEventListener('input', e => {
    const vol = parseInt(e.target.value,10)/100;
    state.voiceVolume = vol;
    $('liveVoiceVolVal').textContent = e.target.value;
    // Local-TTS path: GainNode.gain is a live AudioParam.
    if (state.useLocalTTS && _localTTS.currentGainNode && _localTTS.audioCtx) {
      try {
        _localTTS.currentGainNode.gain.cancelScheduledValues(_localTTS.audioCtx.currentTime);
        _localTTS.currentGainNode.gain.linearRampToValueAtTime(vol, _localTTS.audioCtx.currentTime + 0.05);
      } catch {}
    }
  });
  $('liveTempo')?.addEventListener('input', e => {
    state.tempoMultiplier = parseInt(e.target.value, 10) / 100;
    const v = $('liveTempoVal'); if (v) v.textContent = state.tempoMultiplier.toFixed(1) + '×';
    // Sync Configure-tab slider (Step 5)
    const s4 = $('tempoSlider'); if (s4) s4.value = e.target.value;
    const s4v = $('tempoVal'); if (s4v) s4v.textContent = state.tempoMultiplier.toFixed(1) + '×';
    saveUserSettings();
  });

  // Live background controls
  $('liveBgToggle')?.addEventListener('change', e => {
    const layer = $('bgLayer');
    if (layer) layer.style.display = e.target.checked ? '' : 'none';
    if (e.target.checked) document.body.classList.add('bg-active');
    else document.body.classList.remove('bg-active');
  });
  $('liveBgOpacity')?.addEventListener('input', e => {
    const val = parseInt(e.target.value, 10);
    const v = $('liveBgOpacityVal'); if (v) v.textContent = val + '%';
    // Drive the CSS variable instead of inline-styling each img/video. New
    // images entering the rotation pick up the variable automatically.
    state.bgImageOpacity = val / 100;
    document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--bg-img-opacity', state.bgImageOpacity);
    saveUserSettings();
    // Mirror the value into the Step-5 slider so the two stay in sync
    const setup = $('bgImgOpacitySlider');
    if (setup) setup.value = val;
    const setupVal = $('bgImgOpacityVal');
    if (setupVal) setupVal.textContent = val;
  });

  // Step-5 visibility slider — same plumbing, mirrored to live panel
  $('bgImgOpacitySlider')?.addEventListener('input', e => {
    const val = parseInt(e.target.value, 10);
    const v = $('bgImgOpacityVal'); if (v) v.textContent = val;
    state.bgImageOpacity = val / 100;
    document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--bg-img-opacity', state.bgImageOpacity);
    saveUserSettings();
    const live = $('liveBgOpacity');
    if (live) live.value = val;
    const liveVal = $('liveBgOpacityVal');
    if (liveVal) liveVal.textContent = val + '%';
  });

  // Live "duration between transitions" — sets state.bgRotationSec (seconds
  // each slide holds before swapping). bgEngine reads state directly on its
  // next rotation tick, so changes apply without restarting playback. We
  // also mirror to the Step-5 slider (#bgRotationSlider) when present.
  $('liveBgRotation')?.addEventListener('input', e => {
    const val = parseInt(e.target.value, 10);
    if (!Number.isFinite(val)) return;
    state.bgRotationSec = Math.max(10, Math.min(120, val));
    const v = $('liveBgRotationVal'); if (v) v.textContent = state.bgRotationSec + 's';
    saveUserSettings();
    // Mirror to Step-5 slider if it exists in the DOM
    const setupSlider = $('bgRotationSlider'); if (setupSlider) setupSlider.value = state.bgRotationSec;
    const setupVal    = $('bgRotationVal');    if (setupVal)    setupVal.textContent    = state.bgRotationSec;
    const setupHint   = $('bgRotationHint');   if (setupHint)   setupHint.textContent   = state.bgRotationSec;
  });

  // Live "fade time" — sets state.bgTransitionDuration (seconds the cross-fade
  // lasts). Slider stores value × 10 to allow 0.1s precision on a 1–60 range.
  $('liveBgTransition')?.addEventListener('input', e => {
    const raw = parseInt(e.target.value, 10);
    if (!Number.isFinite(raw)) return;
    const sec = Math.max(0.1, Math.min(6, raw / 10));
    state.bgTransitionDuration = sec;
    const v = $('liveBgTransitionVal'); if (v) v.textContent = sec.toFixed(1) + 's';
    saveUserSettings();
    const setupSlider = $('bgTransitionDurSlider'); if (setupSlider) setupSlider.value = sec;
    const setupVal    = $('bgTransitionDurVal');    if (setupVal)    setupVal.textContent    = sec.toFixed(1);
  });

  // Live HUD toggles — apply immediately during session
  const liveHudMap = { liveFixDot:'fixationDot', liveText:'textDisplay', livePhaseDots:'phaseDots', livePhaseLabel:'phaseLabel', liveProgress:'progressBar', liveTime:'sessionTime', liveLabels:'labels' };
  const liveHudElements = { fixationDot:'fixationDot', textDisplay:'textDisplay', phaseDots:'phaseDots', phaseLabel:'phaseIndicator', progressBar:null, sessionTime:'sessionTime', labels:null };

  for (const [elId, key] of Object.entries(liveHudMap)) {
    $(elId)?.addEventListener('change', e => {
      state.hud[key] = e.target.checked;
      // Also update the Step 5 checkboxes to stay in sync
      const cfgId = 'cfg' + key.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + key.slice(1);
      const cfgEl = $(cfgId); if (cfgEl) cfgEl.checked = e.target.checked;
      // Apply visibility immediately
      const targetId = liveHudElements[key];
      if (targetId) {
        const el = $(targetId); if (el) el.style.display = e.target.checked ? '' : 'none';
      }
      // Special cases
      if (key === 'progressBar') {
        document.querySelector('.session-progress-wrap')?.style.setProperty('display', e.target.checked ? '' : 'none');
      }
      if (key === 'labels') {
        ['personaIndicator','methodIndicator','audioIndicator'].forEach(id => {
          const el = $(id); if (el) el.style.display = e.target.checked ? '' : 'none';
        });
      }
    });
  }

  // ====================================================================
  // SOFT-PAUSE OVERLAY (first Esc press) — Phase 2 safety addition
  // ====================================================================
  // Tiered emergency response: first Esc opens a soft-pause overlay (pauses
  // speech + drone, no termination). Second Esc commits to full emergencyEnd.
  // Clinical literature (Lynn et al., Kluft) on hypnosis safety distinguishes
  // mild discomfort from genuine abreaction — most Esc presses are the former,
  // and the soft pause gives those users an exit without the hard re-alert
  // overhead. Truly distressed users will press Esc twice.
  let _softPauseWasPaused = false; // remember pre-pause state for resume
  function openSoftPause() {
    const overlay = document.getElementById('softPauseOverlay');
    if (!overlay) return false;
    if (overlay.classList.contains('visible')) return false; // already open
    // Pause speech + drone if not already paused — independent of state.paused
    // because togglePause() also flips _pauseStartedAt and we don't want
    // double-counting.
    _softPauseWasPaused = state.paused;
    if (!state.paused) {
      const _now = Date.now();
      try { speechSynthesis.pause(); } catch {}
      if (state.useLocalTTS && _localTTS.ready) { try { _localTTS.pause(); } catch {} }
      if (drone.ctx && drone.running) { try { drone.ctx.suspend(); } catch {} }
      if (_recorder && _recorder.state === 'recording') { try { _recorder.pause(); } catch {} }
      state.paused = true;
      state._pauseStartedAt = _now;
      _markInactiveStart(_now);
      const pb = document.getElementById('pauseBtn'); if (pb) pb.textContent = 'resume';
      if ('mediaSession' in navigator) {
        try { navigator.mediaSession.playbackState = 'paused'; } catch {}
      }
    }
    // Update the time/place line
    const timeEl = document.getElementById('spTimeNow');
    if (timeEl) {
      const now = new Date();
      const day = now.toLocaleDateString(undefined, { weekday: 'long', month: 'short', day: 'numeric' });
      const time = now.toLocaleTimeString(undefined, { hour: 'numeric', minute: '2-digit' });
      timeEl.textContent = `${day} · ${time}`;
    }
    overlay.classList.add('visible');
    document.body.classList.remove('controls-hidden');
    // Focus continue button so Enter resumes
    setTimeout(() => document.getElementById('spContinueBtn')?.focus(), 50);
    return true;
  }
  function closeSoftPauseAndContinue() {
    const overlay = document.getElementById('softPauseOverlay');
    if (!overlay || !overlay.classList.contains('visible')) return;
    overlay.classList.remove('visible');
    // Only resume speech/drone if we paused them (not if user had paused before Esc)
    if (!_softPauseWasPaused) {
      const _now = Date.now();
      if (state._pauseStartedAt) {
        state._pausedTotalMs = (state._pausedTotalMs || 0) + (_now - state._pauseStartedAt);
        state._pauseStartedAt = null;
      }
      state.paused = false;
      _markInactiveEnd(_now);
      try { speechSynthesis.resume(); } catch {}
      if (state.useLocalTTS && _localTTS.ready) { try { _localTTS.resume(); } catch {} }
      if (drone.ctx && drone.running) { try { drone.ctx.resume(); } catch {} }
      if (_recorder && _recorder.state === 'paused') { try { _recorder.resume(); } catch {} }
      const pb = document.getElementById('pauseBtn'); if (pb) pb.textContent = 'pause';
      if ('mediaSession' in navigator) {
        try { navigator.mediaSession.playbackState = 'playing'; } catch {}
      }
    }
  }
  function closeSoftPauseAndEnd() {
    const overlay = document.getElementById('softPauseOverlay');
    if (overlay) overlay.classList.remove('visible');
    // emergencyEnd handles its own pause/resume reconciliation
    emergencyEnd();
  }

  // Keyboard controls during session
  document.addEventListener('keydown', e => {
    if ($('session-screen').style.display === 'none') return;
    if (e.target.tagName === 'INPUT' || e.target.tagName === 'TEXTAREA') return;
    const overlay = document.getElementById('softPauseOverlay');
    const overlayOpen = overlay && overlay.classList.contains('visible');
    // Live settings panel: if it's open, Esc closes it FIRST (before any
    // soft-pause logic). The user's intent is "close this dialog", not
    // "trigger the rescue path".
    const livePanel = document.getElementById('livePanel');
    const livePanelOpen = livePanel && livePanel.classList.contains('open');
    if (e.key === 'Escape' && livePanelOpen && !overlayOpen) {
      e.preventDefault();
      if (typeof closeLivePanel === 'function') closeLivePanel();
      return;
    }
    if (e.key === 'Escape') {
      e.preventDefault();
      if (overlayOpen) {
        // Second Esc → commit to full emergency end
        closeSoftPauseAndEnd();
      } else {
        // First Esc → open soft-pause overlay
        openSoftPause();
      }
      return;
    }
    if (overlayOpen) {
      // While the overlay is open: Space or Enter resumes; other keys do nothing
      if (e.code === 'Space' || e.key === 'Enter') {
        e.preventDefault();
        closeSoftPauseAndContinue();
      }
      return;
    }
    if (e.code === 'Space') { e.preventDefault(); togglePause(); }
    showSessionControls(); // any key shows controls
  });

  // Auto-hide session controls after 5s of inactivity
  var _controlsTimer = null;
  function showSessionControls() {
    document.body.classList.remove('controls-hidden');
    clearTimeout(_controlsTimer);
    if (state._sessionStartTime && !state.abortFlag && !state.paused) {
      _controlsTimer = setTimeout(() => document.body.classList.add('controls-hidden'), 5000);
    }
  }
  document.addEventListener('mousemove', () => {
    if ($('session-screen')?.style.display !== 'none') showSessionControls();
  });
  document.addEventListener('touchstart', () => {
    if ($('session-screen')?.style.display !== 'none') showSessionControls();
  }, { passive: true });

  // Wake Lock re-acquire + pause/resume on visibility change
  document.addEventListener('visibilitychange', async () => {
    if (document.visibilityState === 'visible' && state._sessionStartTime && !state.abortFlag) {
      // Flush hidden-time into the accumulator. Without this, time spent
      // with the tab hidden (during which drone.ctx is suspended and local
      // TTS audio is therefore frozen) keeps counting toward elapsed
      // session time, skewing the timer + completedFraction metric. Same
      // bookkeeping shape as _pausedTotalMs.
      if (state._hiddenStartedAt) {
        const _now = Date.now();
        state._hiddenTotalMs = (state._hiddenTotalMs || 0) + (_now - state._hiddenStartedAt);
        state._hiddenStartedAt = null;
        // RAF wasn't ticking during hidden, so tickStateEngine's drag-
        // forward (state.paused || _hiddenStartedAt branch) never ran.
        // Push the wallclock anchors forward here so the first visible
        // tick doesn't see a giant sinceVoiceSec / phaseSec.
        if (_engineLastVoiceAt) _engineLastVoiceAt = _now;
        if (_enginePhaseEnteredAt) _enginePhaseEnteredAt = _now;
        // Close the inactive-union window if pause isn't also active. If
        // the user is paused and hidden together, this is a no-op and the
        // window stays open until they un-pause.
        _markInactiveEnd(_now);
      }
      // Re-acquire wake lock
      try {
        if (navigator.wakeLock && !state._wakeLock) {
          state._wakeLock = await navigator.wakeLock.request('screen');
          state._wakeLock.addEventListener('release', () => { state._wakeLock = null; });
        }
      } catch(e) {}
      // Resume audio context if suspended — but NOT if user explicitly paused the session
      if (!state.paused && drone.ctx?.state === 'suspended') { try { await drone.ctx.resume(); } catch(e) {} }
      // Resume the ambience recorder too — only if it was paused by hidden,
      // not if it was paused because the user paused the session.
      if (!state.paused && _recorder && _recorder.state === 'paused') {
        try { _recorder.resume(); } catch {}
      }
    } else if (document.visibilityState === 'hidden' && state._sessionStartTime && !state.abortFlag) {
      // Mark the start of a hidden window so the visible branch can
      // accumulate the duration. Idempotent — only set if not already set,
      // which handles the (rare) double-hidden visibilitychange burst.
      if (!state._hiddenStartedAt) {
        state._hiddenStartedAt = Date.now();
        _markInactiveStart(state._hiddenStartedAt);
      }
      // Suspend audio context to save battery when tab hidden
      if (drone.ctx?.state === 'running') { try { drone.ctx.suspend(); } catch(e) {} }
      // Pause the recorder too — drone.ctx being suspended means the audio
      // graph is silent, so the recording would otherwise capture silence.
      if (_recorder && _recorder.state === 'recording') { try { _recorder.pause(); } catch {} }
    }
  });

  // Post-session save

  // Voice preview with stop
  $('voicePreviewBtn').addEventListener('click', async () => {
    const voice = getSelectedVoice();
    const samples = [
      "And now... noticing the weight of your hands... just resting there...",
      "Each breath carrying you a little deeper now... that's right...",
      "The sound of my voice becoming the only thing that matters...",
      "Drifting comfortably... nowhere to be... nothing to do...",
    ];
    const sample = samples[Math.floor(Math.random() * samples.length)];
    // Local AI voice path — only when enabled AND ready (no fallback to system
    // voice during preview; if it's not loaded the user is told to wait).
    if (state.useLocalTTS) {
      if (!_localTTS.ready) {
        notify.info(_localTTS.loading
          ? 'Local voice is still loading — try again in a moment.'
          : 'Local voice is enabled but not loaded yet. Toggle it off to use the system voice.');
        return;
      }
      _voicePreviewing = true;
      togglePreviewBtns('voice', true);
      try { await _localTTS.speak(sample); } catch {}
      _voicePreviewing = false;
      togglePreviewBtns('voice', false);
      return;
    }
    if (!('speechSynthesis' in window)) { notify.info('Text-to-speech is not available in this browser.'); return; }
    speechSynthesis.cancel();
    const u = new SpeechSynthesisUtterance(sample);
    u.voice = voice; u.rate = state.speechRate; u.pitch = state.voicePitch || 0.85; u.volume = state.voiceVolume ?? 1.0;
    u.onend = () => { _voicePreviewing = false; togglePreviewBtns('voice', false); };
    u.onerror = u.onend;
    speechSynthesis.speak(u);
    _voicePreviewing = true;
    togglePreviewBtns('voice', true);
  });
  $('voiceStopBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
    speechSynthesis.cancel();
    if (state.useLocalTTS && _localTTS.ready) _localTTS.cancel();
    _voicePreviewing = false;
    togglePreviewBtns('voice', false);
  });

  // Crafted-suggestion voice preview — auditions the AI-crafted hypnotic
  // text in the user's selected narrator voice. Reuses the same TTS path
  // as the main voice preview so all rate/pitch/volume settings apply.
  $('craftedVoicePreviewBtn')?.addEventListener('click', async () => {
    if (!state.craftedSuggestion) {
      notify.info('Craft a suggestion first.');
      return;
    }
    // Pull the latest text — user may have edited via the manual editor.
    const editable = $('craftedEditable');
    const text = (editable && editable.style.display !== 'none' && editable.value.trim())
      ? editable.value.trim()
      : (state.craftedSuggestion.craftedSuggestion || '').trim();
    if (!text) { notify.info('Nothing to preview yet.'); return; }
    // Stop other previews to avoid voice/sound overlap.
    if (typeof _stopAllPreviews === 'function') _stopAllPreviews();
    const voice = getSelectedVoice();
    if (state.useLocalTTS) {
      if (!_localTTS.ready) {
        notify.info(_localTTS.loading
          ? 'Local voice is still loading — try again in a moment.'
          : 'Local voice is enabled but not loaded yet. Toggle it off to use the system voice.');
        return;
      }
      _voicePreviewing = true;
      togglePreviewBtns('craftedVoice', true);
      try { await _localTTS.speak(text); } catch {}
      _voicePreviewing = false;
      togglePreviewBtns('craftedVoice', false);
      return;
    }
    if (!('speechSynthesis' in window)) { notify.info('Text-to-speech is not available in this browser.'); return; }
    speechSynthesis.cancel();
    const u = new SpeechSynthesisUtterance(text);
    u.voice = voice; u.rate = state.speechRate; u.pitch = state.voicePitch || 0.85; u.volume = state.voiceVolume ?? 1.0;
    u.onend = () => { _voicePreviewing = false; togglePreviewBtns('craftedVoice', false); };
    u.onerror = u.onend;
    speechSynthesis.speak(u);
    _voicePreviewing = true;
    togglePreviewBtns('craftedVoice', true);
  });
  $('craftedVoiceStopBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
    speechSynthesis.cancel();
    if (state.useLocalTTS && _localTTS.ready) _localTTS.cancel();
    _voicePreviewing = false;
    togglePreviewBtns('craftedVoice', false);
  });

  // Voice select change → update info
  $('voiceSelect').addEventListener('change', async () => { updateVoiceInfo(); state._savedVoiceName = $('voiceSelect').value; saveUserSettings(); try { if (_kv) await _kv.settings.set(SETTINGS_KEY, _buildSettingsObj()); } catch {} });

  // Soundscape preview
  $('soundPreviewBtn')?.addEventListener('click', previewSoundscape);
  $('soundStopBtn')?.addEventListener('click', stopSoundscapePreview);

  // Viz preview
  $('vizPreviewBtn')?.addEventListener('click', startVizPreview);
  $('vizStopBtn')?.addEventListener('click', stopVizPreview);

  // Stop all previews when leaving Step 5 (Configure)
  const _stopAllPreviews = () => { stopVizPreview(); stopSoundscapePreview(); if (_voicePreviewing) { speechSynthesis.cancel(); if (state.useLocalTTS && _localTTS.ready) _localTTS.cancel(); _voicePreviewing = false; togglePreviewBtns('voice', false); } };

  // ====================================================================
  // CAPABILITY DETECTION (from Studio capabilities.js)
  // ====================================================================
  // ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  // Legacy aliases — the comprehensive replacement is `detectCapabilities`
  // and `state.caps` higher in this file. Kept for backward compat with
  // any code that still references `caps.vibration` / `caps.tts` etc.
  // ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  const caps = state.caps;
  function detectCaps() {
    detectCapabilities();
    // Don't show warnings here — that's warnMissingCapabilities's job, called
    // later (after first session-screen entry) so the user has context.
  }

  // ====================================================================
  // QUICK-START PRESETS
  // ====================================================================
  // ====================================================================
  // FIRST-RUN SAFETY / CONTRAINDICATION SCREEN
  // ====================================================================
  // Safety contraindication info moved to Help & Safety Resources button in sidebar

  // ====================================================================
  // RISING-SCORE SPARKLINE (renders pre/post improvement over sessions)
  // ====================================================================
  async function renderSparkline() {
    const wrap = $('sessionStatsPanel');
    if (!wrap) return;
    const history = (await idbGet('stillness_history_v1')) || [];
    // Filter sessions with both pre and post scores
    const scored = history.filter(s => s.preMood != null && s.postMood != null).slice(0, 20).reverse();
    if (scored.length < 2) return; // Need at least 2 data points

    // Append canvas if not already there
    let sparkWrap = $('sparklineWrap');
    if (!sparkWrap) {
      sparkWrap = document.createElement('div');
      sparkWrap.id = 'sparklineWrap';
      sparkWrap.className = 'sparkline-wrap';
      sparkWrap.innerHTML = '<div class="mood-label">your state improvement over sessions</div><canvas class="sparkline-canvas" id="sparklineCanvas"></canvas>';
      wrap.appendChild(sparkWrap);
    }
    const canvas = $('sparklineCanvas');
    if (!canvas) return;
    canvas.width = canvas.offsetWidth || 280;
    canvas.height = 60;
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    const W = canvas.width, H = canvas.height;

    // Pre scores (grey), post scores (accent), delta line (green)
    const pad = 8;
    const xStep = (W - pad * 2) / (scored.length - 1);

    ctx.clearRect(0, 0, W, H);

    // Draw pre scores (dim)
    ctx.beginPath();
    scored.forEach((s, i) => {
      const x = pad + i * xStep, y = H - pad - (s.preMood / 10) * (H - pad * 2);
      i === 0 ? ctx.moveTo(x, y) : ctx.lineTo(x, y);
    });
    ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(107,148,184,0.25)'; ctx.lineWidth = 1; ctx.stroke();

    // Draw post scores (bright)
    ctx.beginPath();
    scored.forEach((s, i) => {
      const x = pad + i * xStep, y = H - pad - (s.postMood / 10) * (H - pad * 2);
      i === 0 ? ctx.moveTo(x, y) : ctx.lineTo(x, y);
    });
    ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(107,184,130,0.7)'; ctx.lineWidth = 2; ctx.stroke();

    // Dots on post scores
    scored.forEach((s, i) => {
      const x = pad + i * xStep, y = H - pad - (s.postMood / 10) * (H - pad * 2);
      ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(x, y, 2.5, 0, Math.PI * 2);
      ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(107,184,130,0.9)'; ctx.fill();
    });
  }

  // ====================================================================
  // WARM OVERLAY FOR SLEEP SESSIONS
  // ====================================================================
  function setSleepOverlay(active) {
    const overlay = $('sleepOverlay');
    if (overlay) overlay.classList.toggle('active', active);
  }

  // ====================================================================
  // QUICK-START PRESETS — expanded to 12 clinical verticals
  // ====================================================================
  const PRESETS = [
    { id: 'sleep', icon: '🌙', name: 'Sleep', desc: 'Drift off naturally',
      persona: 'therapist', method: 'progressive', intention: 'sleep', length: 'long', soundscape: 'ocean', vizOverride: 'aurora' },

  function renderPresets() {
    const grid = $('presetGrid');
    if (!grid) return;
    grid.innerHTML = '';
    PRESETS.forEach(p => {
      const card = document.createElement('div');
      card.className = `preset-card intent-${p.intention || 'trance'}`;
      card.innerHTML = `<div class="preset-icon">${p.icon}</div><div class="preset-name">${escapeHtml(p.name)}</div><div class="preset-desc">${escapeHtml(p.desc)}</div><div class="preset-intent-label">${escapeHtml(p.intention || 'trance')}</div>`;
      card.addEventListener('click', () => applyPreset(p));
      grid.appendChild(card);
    });
  }

  function applyPreset(p) {
    state.selectedPersonaId = p.persona; state.selectedMethodId = p.method;
    state.intentionType = p.intention; state.length = p.length;
    state.soundscape = p.soundscape; state.droneEnabled = p.soundscape !== 'none';
    if (p.vizOverride) { state.vizOverride = p.vizOverride; const ve = $('vizSelect'); if (ve) ve.value = p.vizOverride; }
    $('intentionType').value = p.intention;
    $('lengthSelect').value = p.length;
    const ssSelect = $('soundscapeSelect');
    if (ssSelect) ssSelect.value = p.soundscape;
    renderPersonaGrid(); renderPersonaDetail(); renderMethodGrid(); renderMethodDetail();
    updateIntentionHint(); updateStepUI();
    state.stepsCompleted = { 1: true, 2: true, 3: true, 4: false, 5: false, 6: false };
    goToStep(4);
    notify.success(`Preset "${p.name}" loaded — configure and generate.`);
  }

  async function getActiveProgramState() {
    return (await idbGet('stillness_program_v1')) || null;
  }
  async function saveActiveProgramState(ps) {
    await idbSet('stillness_program_v1', ps);
  }

  async function renderPrograms() {
    const grid = $('programGrid');
    const activePanel = $('programActivePanel');
    if (!grid) return;

    const active = await getActiveProgramState();

    // Show active program status
    if (active && activePanel) {
      const prog = PROGRAMS.find(p => p.id === active.programId);
      if (prog) {
        const pct = Math.round((active.currentDay / prog.days) * 100);
        const todayFocus = prog.arc ? prog.arc[Math.min(active.currentDay, prog.arc.length - 1)] : `Day ${active.currentDay + 1}`;
        activePanel.innerHTML = `
          <div class="detail-panel" style="margin-bottom:12px">
            <div class="detail-title">${prog.icon} ${escapeHtml(prog.name)} — Day ${active.currentDay + 1} of ${prog.days}</div>
            <div style="font-size:0.75rem;color:var(--text-dim);margin:6px 0">Today's focus: <strong>${escapeHtml(todayFocus)}</strong></div>
            <div class="session-progress-wrap" style="position:relative;height:4px;margin:8px 0"><div class="session-progress-fill" style="width:${pct}%"></div></div>
            <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;margin-top:8px">
              <button class="btn secondary" id="programContinueBtn" style="flex:1;font-size:0.82rem">continue program →</button>
              <button class="btn secondary" id="programQuitBtn" style="font-size:0.82rem;color:#8a5a58">quit program</button>
            </div>
          </div>`;
        $('programContinueBtn')?.addEventListener('click', () => startProgramDay(prog, active));
        $('programQuitBtn')?.addEventListener('click', async () => {
          if (await confirmAsync(`Quit "${prog.name}"? Your progress (Day ${active.currentDay + 1}) will be lost.`)) {
            await idbSet('stillness_program_v1', null);
            renderPrograms();
          }
        });
      }
    } else if (activePanel) {
      activePanel.innerHTML = '';
    }

    // Show program cards
    grid.innerHTML = '';
    PROGRAMS.forEach(prog => {
      const isActive = active?.programId === prog.id;
      const card = document.createElement('div');
      card.className = `preset-card is-program intent-${prog.intention || 'trance'}` + (isActive ? ' selected' : '');
      card.innerHTML = `<div class="preset-icon">${prog.icon}</div><div class="preset-name">${escapeHtml(prog.name)}</div><div class="preset-desc">${prog.days} days · ${escapeHtml(prog.desc)}</div><div class="preset-intent-label">${escapeHtml(prog.intention || 'trance')}</div>`;
      card.addEventListener('click', async () => {
        if (isActive) { startProgramDay(prog, active); return; }
        if (active) { if (!await confirmAsync('Starting a new program will replace your current one. Continue?')) return; }
        const newState = { programId: prog.id, currentDay: 0, startedAt: Date.now(), anchors: [], completedDays: [] };
        await saveActiveProgramState(newState);
        renderPrograms();
        notify.success(`Started "${prog.name}" — Day 1 of ${prog.days}.`);
      });
      grid.appendChild(card);
    });
  }

  function startProgramDay(prog, ps) {
    markFeatureUsed(FEAT.PROGRAMS);
    // Apply program settings (base)
    state.selectedPersonaId = prog.persona; state.selectedMethodId = prog.method;
    state.intentionType = prog.intention; state.length = prog.length;
    state.soundscape = prog.soundscape; state.droneEnabled = prog.soundscape !== 'none';
    if (prog.vizOverride) { state.vizOverride = prog.vizOverride; const ve = $('vizSelect'); if (ve) ve.value = prog.vizOverride; }
    // Apply per-day overrides (soundscape, visual, method variety across the program)
    const dayNum = ps.currentDay + 1;
    const overrides = prog.dayOverrides?.[dayNum];
    if (overrides) {
      if (overrides.soundscape) { state.soundscape = overrides.soundscape; state.droneEnabled = overrides.soundscape !== 'none'; }
      if (overrides.vizOverride) { state.vizOverride = overrides.vizOverride; const ve = $('vizSelect'); if (ve) ve.value = overrides.vizOverride; }
      if (overrides.method) state.selectedMethodId = overrides.method;
      if (overrides.persona) state.selectedPersonaId = overrides.persona;
    }
    $('intentionType').value = prog.intention;
    $('lengthSelect').value = prog.length;
    const ssSelect = $('soundscapeSelect'); if (ssSelect) ssSelect.value = state.soundscape;

    // Set the intention input with program context
    const dayFocus = prog.arc ? prog.arc[Math.min(ps.currentDay, (prog.arc?.length || 1) - 1)] : `Day ${dayNum} of structured ${prog.name} program`;
    const anchors = Array.isArray(ps.anchors) ? ps.anchors : [];
    const anchorContext = anchors.length ? `Prior anchors: ${anchors.join(', ')}. ` : '';
    $('intentionInput').value = `${anchorContext}Day ${dayNum} of ${prog.days}: ${dayFocus}`;

    state._activeProgram = { prog, ps };
    renderPersonaGrid(); renderPersonaDetail(); renderMethodGrid(); renderMethodDetail();
    updateIntentionHint(); updateStepUI();
    state.stepsCompleted = { 1: true, 2: true, 3: true, 4: false, 5: false, 6: false };
    goToStep(4);
    notify.success(`Day ${dayNum}: ${dayFocus}`);
  }

  // Advance program after successful session completion
  async function advanceProgramDay() {
    if (!state._activeProgram) return;
    const { prog, ps } = state._activeProgram;
    ps.currentDay = Math.min(ps.currentDay + 1, prog.days);
    if (!Array.isArray(ps.completedDays)) ps.completedDays = [];
    ps.completedDays.push(Date.now());
    await saveActiveProgramState(ps);
    if (ps.currentDay >= prog.days) {
      notify.success(`🎉 Congratulations! You completed "${prog.name}".`);
      await idbSet('stillness_program_v1', null); // Clear completed program
    }
    state._activeProgram = null;
  }

  // ====================================================================
  // MEDIA SESSION API — lock-screen controls for mobile
  // ====================================================================
  function setMediaSession(playing) {
    if (!('mediaSession' in navigator)) return;
    if (playing === false) {
      // Tear-down path — used at session end so the lock-screen card clears.
      try {
        navigator.mediaSession.metadata = null;
        navigator.mediaSession.setActionHandler('play', null);
        navigator.mediaSession.setActionHandler('pause', null);
        navigator.mediaSession.setActionHandler('stop', null);
        navigator.mediaSession.playbackState = 'none';
      } catch {}
      return;
    }
    const persona = getPersona(), method = getMethod();
    navigator.mediaSession.metadata = new MediaMetadata({
      title: method.name + ' — ' + (state.length),
      artist: persona.name,
      album: 'Stillness Generator',
    });
    navigator.mediaSession.setActionHandler('play', () => { if (state.paused) togglePause(); });
    navigator.mediaSession.setActionHandler('pause', () => { if (!state.paused) togglePause(); });
    navigator.mediaSession.setActionHandler('stop', () => emergencyEnd());
    // Surface play/pause state to the OS lock-screen UI. Without this the
    // icon is stuck on the default ('none' or stale 'playing') even when
    // the user pauses, so the lock-screen control reads wrong.
    try { navigator.mediaSession.playbackState = state.paused ? 'paused' : 'playing'; } catch {}
  }

  // ====================================================================
  // ACTIVITY HEATMAP (from Studio metrics-history.js)
  // ====================================================================
  async function renderHeatmap() {
    const wrap = $('heatmapWrap');
    if (!wrap) return;
    const history = (await idbGet('stillness_history_v1')) || [];
    if (history.length === 0) { wrap.innerHTML = ''; return; }

    // Build day→count map for the last 16 weeks (112 days)
    const dayCounts = {};
    history.forEach(s => {
      const d = new Date(s.date); d.setHours(0,0,0,0);
      const key = d.toISOString().slice(0,10);
      dayCounts[key] = (dayCounts[key] || 0) + 1;
    });

    const today = new Date(); today.setHours(0,0,0,0);
    const dayMs = 86400000;
    // Start from 15 weeks ago, aligned to Monday
    const startDay = new Date(today.getTime() - 15 * 7 * dayMs);
    startDay.setDate(startDay.getDate() - ((startDay.getDay() + 6) % 7)); // Monday

    let html = '<div class="heatmap">';
    let d = new Date(startDay);
    while (d <= today) {
      html += '<div class="heatmap-col">';
      for (let row = 0; row < 7 && d <= today; row++) {
        const key = d.toISOString().slice(0,10);
        const count = dayCounts[key] || 0;
        const level = count === 0 ? 0 : count === 1 ? 1 : count === 2 ? 2 : count <= 4 ? 3 : 4;
        const title = `${key}: ${count} session${count !== 1 ? 's' : ''}`;
        html += `<div class="heatmap-cell" data-count="${level}" title="${title}"></div>`;
        d.setDate(d.getDate() + 1);
      }
      html += '</div>';
    }
    html += '</div>';
    wrap.innerHTML = html;
  }

  // ONBOARDING TOUR (from Studio profile-tour.js)
  // ====================================================================
  const TOUR_KEY = 'stillness_tour_v2';
  const TOUR_STEPS = [
